title: AsyncVLA: An Asynchronous VLA for Fast and Robust Navigation on the Edge
summary: Robotic foundation models achieve strong generalization by leveraging internet-scale vision-language representations, but their massive computational cost creates a fundamental bottleneck: high inference latency. In dynamic environments, this latency breaks the control loop, rendering powerful models unsafe for real-time deployment. We propose AsyncVLA, an asynchronous control framework that decouples semantic reasoning from reactive execution. Inspired by hierarchical control, AsyncVLA runs a large foundation model on a remote workstation to provide high-level guidance, while a lightweight, onboard Edge Adapter continuously refines actions at high frequency. To bridge the domain gap between these asynchronous streams, we introduce an end-to-end finetuning protocol and a trajectory re-weighting strategy that prioritizes dynamic interactions. We evaluate our approach on real-world vision-based navigation tasks with communication delays up to 6 seconds. AsyncVLA achieves a 40% higher success rate than state-of-the-art baselines, effectively bridging the gap between the semantic intelligence of large models and the reactivity required for edge robotics.
tldr: The paper introduces AsyncVLA, an asynchronous control framework that leverages large foundation models remotely while using a lightweight, onboard Edge Adapter for real-time action refinement, enabling robust vision-based navigation on the edge with significant performance improvements.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AsyncVLA，一种异步控制框架，它利用远程大型基础模型，同时使用轻量级的板载边缘适配器进行实时动作细化，从而在边缘实现强大的基于视觉的导航，并显著提升性能。
summary_zh: 机器人基础模型利用互联网规模的视觉-语言表征实现了强大的泛化能力，但其巨大的计算成本造成了一个根本性的瓶颈：高推理延迟。在动态环境中，这种延迟会中断控制回路，使得强大的模型无法安全地进行实时部署。我们提出了AsyncVLA，一个将语义推理与反应式执行解耦的异步控制框架。受到分层控制的启发，AsyncVLA在一个远程工作站上运行一个大型基础模型，以提供高层次的指导，同时一个轻量级的、板载的边缘适配器以高频率持续优化动作。为了弥合这些异步流之间的领域差距，我们引入了一个端到端的微调协议和一个轨迹重加权策略，该策略优先考虑动态交互。我们在具有高达6秒通信延迟的真实世界视觉导航任务中评估了我们的方法。AsyncVLA比最先进的基线实现了高出40%的成功率，有效地弥合了大型模型的语义智能与边缘机器人所需的反应性之间的差距。

title: Steerable Vision-Language-Action Policies for Embodied Reasoning and Hierarchical Control
summary:
Pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) can make semantic and visual inferences across diverse settings, providing valuable common-sense priors for robotic control. However, effectively grounding this knowledge in robot behaviors remains an open challenge. Prior methods often employ a hierarchical approach where VLMs reason over high-level commands to be executed by separate low-level policies, e.g., vision-language-action models (VLAs). The interface between VLMs and VLAs is usually natural language task instructions, which fundamentally limits how much VLM reasoning can steer low-level behavior. We thus introduce Steerable Policies: VLAs trained on rich synthetic commands at various levels of abstraction, like subtasks, motions, and grounded pixel coordinates. By improving low-level controllability, Steerable Policies can unlock pretrained knowledge in VLMs, enabling improved task generalization. We demonstrate this benefit by controlling our Steerable Policies with both a learned high-level embodied reasoner and an off-the-shelf VLM prompted to reason over command abstractions via in-context learning. Across extensive real-world manipulation experiments, these two novel methods outperform prior embodied reasoning VLAs and VLM-based hierarchical baselines, including on challenging generalization and long-horizon tasks.
  Website: steerable-policies.github.io
tldr: This paper introduces "Steerable Policies," a novel VLA approach that leverages rich synthetic commands at different abstraction levels to improve low-level robot control, enabling better utilization of pretrained VLMs for embodied reasoning and task generalization in real-world manipulation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为“可操纵策略（Steerable Policies）”的新型 VLA 方法，该方法利用各种抽象程度的丰富合成命令来提高低级别机器人控制的水平，从而更好地利用预训练 VLM 在现实世界操作中的具身推理和任务泛化能力。
summary_zh:
预训练视觉-语言模型（VLMs）能够跨越多种场景进行语义和视觉推理，为机器人控制提供有价值的常识先验知识。然而，如何有效地将这些知识融入机器人行为仍然是一个尚未解决的难题。先前的方法通常采用分层方法，即VLMs对由独立的低级策略执行的高级命令进行推理，例如视觉-语言-动作模型（VLAs）。VLMs和VLAs之间的接口通常是自然语言任务指令，这从根本上限制了VLM推理对低级行为的指导程度。因此，我们引入了可控策略：训练在各种抽象层级（如子任务、动作和接地像素坐标）的丰富合成命令上的VLAs。通过提高低级可控性，可控策略可以解锁VLMs中预训练的知识，从而提高任务泛化能力。我们通过使用学习型高级具身推理器和一个现成的VLM（通过上下文学习提示其对命令抽象进行推理）来控制我们的可控策略，从而展示了这种优势。在广泛的真实世界操作实验中，这两种新方法都优于先前的具身推理VLAs和基于VLM的分层基线，包括在具有挑战性的泛化和长程任务上。
  网站: steerable-policies.github.io

title: OpAgent: Operator Agent for Web Navigation
summary: To fulfill user instructions, autonomous web agents must contend with the inherent complexity and volatile nature of real-world websites. Conventional paradigms predominantly rely on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) or Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) using static datasets. However, these methods suffer from severe distributional shifts, as offline trajectories fail to capture the stochastic state transitions and real-time feedback of unconstrained wide web environments. In this paper, we propose a robust Online Reinforcement Learning WebAgent, designed to optimize its policy through direct, iterative interactions with unconstrained wide websites. Our approach comprises three core innovations: 1) Hierarchical Multi-Task Fine-tuning: We curate a comprehensive mixture of datasets categorized by functional primitives -- Planning, Acting, and Grounding -- establishing a Vision-Language Model (VLM) with strong instruction-following capabilities for Web GUI tasks. 2) Online Agentic RL in the Wild: We develop an online interaction environment and fine-tune the VLM using a specialized RL pipeline. We introduce a Hybrid Reward Mechanism that combines a ground-truth-agnostic WebJudge for holistic outcome assessment with a Rule-based Decision Tree (RDT) for progress reward. This system effectively mitigates the credit assignment challenge in long-horizon navigation. Notably, our RL-enhanced model achieves a 38.1\% success rate (pass@5) on WebArena, outperforming all existing monolithic baselines. 3) Operator Agent: We introduce a modular agentic framework, namely \textbf{OpAgent}, orchestrating a Planner, Grounder, Reflector, and Summarizer. This synergy enables robust error recovery and self-correction, elevating the agent's performance to a new State-of-the-Art (SOTA) success rate of \textbf{71.6\%}.
tldr: The paper introduces OpAgent, an online reinforcement learning web agent that uses a hierarchical fine-tuning approach and a modular agentic framework to achieve state-of-the-art performance in web navigation, significantly outperforming existing baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OpAgent，一种在线强化学习网络代理，它使用分层微调方法和模块化代理框架，在网络导航方面实现了最先进的性能，显著优于现有的基线。
summary_zh: 为了完成用户指令，自主网络代理必须应对真实世界网站固有的复杂性和易变性。传统范式主要依赖于监督式微调（SFT）或使用静态数据集的离线强化学习（RL）。然而，这些方法遭受严重的分布偏移，因为离线轨迹无法捕捉到不受约束的广域网络环境中的随机状态转移和实时反馈。在本文中，我们提出了一种鲁棒的在线强化学习WebAgent，旨在通过与不受约束的广域网站直接、迭代的交互来优化其策略。我们的方法包含三个核心创新：1) 分层多任务微调：精选了一个由功能原语（规划、行动和接地）分类的综合数据集混合，建立了一个具有强大指令遵循能力的视觉-语言模型（VLM），用于Web GUI任务。 2) 野外在线Agentic RL：开发了一个在线交互环境，并使用专门的RL管道对VLM进行微调。我们引入了一种混合奖励机制，将用于整体结果评估的与真值无关的WebJudge与用于进度奖励的基于规则的决策树（RDT）相结合。该系统有效地缓解了长程导航中的信用分配难题。值得注意的是，我们经过RL增强的模型在WebArena上实现了38.1%的成功率（pass@5），优于所有现有的单体基线。3) 操作员代理：引入了一个模块化的agentic框架，即\textbf{OpAgent}，它协调规划器、接地器、反射器和摘要器。这种协同作用实现了强大的错误恢复和自我纠正，将代理的性能提升到\textbf{71.6%}的全新最先进（SOTA）成功率。

title: Semantic-Contact Fields for Category-Level Generalizable Tactile Tool Manipulation
summary:
Generalizing tool manipulation requires both semantic planning and precise physical control. Modern generalist robot policies, such as Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, often lack the high-fidelity physical grounding required for contact-rich tool manipulation. Conversely, existing contact-aware policies that leverage tactile or haptic sensing are typically instance-specific and fail to generalize across diverse tool geometries. Bridging this gap requires learning unified contact representations from diverse data, yet a fundamental barrier remains: diverse real-world tactile data are prohibitive at scale, while direct zero-shot sim-to-real transfer is challenging due to the complex dynamics of nonlinear deformation of soft sensors.
  To address this, we propose Semantic-Contact Fields (SCFields), a unified 3D representation fusing visual semantics with dense contact estimates. We enable this via a two-stage Sim-to-Real Contact Learning Pipeline: first, we pre-train on a large simulation data set to learn general contact physics; second, we fine-tune on a small set of real data, pseudo-labeled via geometric heuristics and force optimization, to align sensor characteristics. This allows physical generalization to unseen tools. We leverage SCFields as the dense observation input for a diffusion policy to enable robust execution of contact-rich tool manipulation tasks. Experiments on scraping, crayon drawing, and peeling demonstrate robust category-level generalization, significantly outperforming vision-only and raw-tactile baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces Semantic-Contact Fields (SCFields), a 3D representation fusing visual semantics with contact estimates, trained via a Sim-to-Real pipeline for category-level generalizable tactile tool manipulation, demonstrating improved performance in scraping, drawing, and peeling tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为语义接触场(SCFields)的3D表示方法，它将视觉语义与接触估计融合，并通过一个Sim-to-Real的流水线进行训练，用于类别级别的可泛化触觉工具操作。实验表明，在刮削、绘画和剥离等任务中，其性能优于仅使用视觉或原始触觉信息的基线模型。
summary_zh:
通用工具操作既需要语义规划，也需要精确的物理控制。现代通用机器人策略，例如视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，通常缺乏接触密集型工具操作所需的高保真物理基础。相反，现有的利用触觉或力觉感知的接触感知策略通常是特定于实例的，并且无法推广到不同的工具几何形状。弥合这一差距需要从多样化数据中学习统一的接触表示，但仍然存在一个根本障碍：大规模多样化的真实世界触觉数据获取成本高昂，而直接的零样本Sim-to-Real迁移则由于软传感器的非线性变形的复杂动力学而具有挑战性。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了语义-接触场（SCFields），一种融合视觉语义和密集接触估计的统一3D表示。我们通过一个两阶段的Sim-to-Real接触学习流程来实现这一点：首先，我们在大型模拟数据集上进行预训练，以学习一般的接触物理；其次，我们通过几何启发式和力优化进行伪标记，在少量真实数据上进行微调，以对齐传感器特性。这使得物理泛化到未见过的工具成为可能。我们将SCFields作为扩散策略的密集观测输入，以实现接触密集型工具操作任务的鲁棒执行。在刮擦、蜡笔绘画和剥离的实验表明，其具有强大的类别级泛化能力，显著优于仅视觉和原始触觉基线。

title: Ontological grounding for sound and natural robot explanations via large language models
summary: Building effective human-robot interaction requires robots to derive conclusions from their experiences that are both logically sound and communicated in ways aligned with human expectations. This paper presents a hybrid framework that blends ontology-based reasoning with large language models (LLMs) to produce semantically grounded and natural robot explanations. Ontologies ensure logical consistency and domain grounding, while LLMs provide fluent, context-aware and adaptive language generation. The proposed method grounds data from human-robot experiences, enabling robots to reason about whether events are typical or atypical based on their properties. We integrate a state-of-the-art algorithm for retrieving and constructing static contrastive ontology-based narratives with an LLM agent that uses them to produce concise, clear, interactive explanations. The approach is validated through a laboratory study replicating an industrial collaborative task. Empirical results show significant improvements in the clarity and brevity of ontology-based narratives while preserving their semantic accuracy. Initial evaluations further demonstrate the system's ability to adapt explanations to user feedback. Overall, this work highlights the potential of ontology-LLM integration to advance explainable agency, and promote more transparent human-robot collaboration.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid framework combining ontologies and LLMs to generate semantically grounded and natural robot explanations, improving clarity and brevity while maintaining accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种结合本体和大型语言模型（LLM）的混合框架，用于生成语义明确且自然的机器人解释，从而在保持准确性的同时提高清晰度和简洁性。
summary_zh: 构建有效的人机交互需要机器人从其经验中得出逻辑上合理且与人类期望相符的结论并进行交流。本文提出了一种混合框架，将基于本体的推理与大型语言模型 (LLM) 相结合，以生成语义扎根且自然的机器人解释。本体确保逻辑一致性和领域基础，而 LLM 提供流畅、上下文感知和自适应的语言生成。所提出的方法扎根于人机交互经验中的数据，使机器人能够根据事件的属性来推理事件是典型的还是非典型的。我们将用于检索和构建静态对比的基于本体的叙事的最新算法与 LLM 代理集成，后者使用这些叙事来生成简洁、清晰、交互式的解释。通过实验室研究复制工业协作任务来验证该方法。经验结果表明，在保持语义准确性的同时，基于本体的叙事的清晰度和简洁度显著提高。初步评估进一步证明了系统根据用户反馈调整解释的能力。总而言之，这项工作突出了本体-LLM 集成在推进可解释代理和促进更透明的人机协作方面的潜力。

title: MOTIF: Learning Action Motifs for Few-shot Cross-Embodiment Transfer
summary: While vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced generalist robotic learning, cross-embodiment transfer remains challenging due to kinematic heterogeneity and the high cost of collecting sufficient real-world demonstrations to support fine-tuning. Existing cross-embodiment policies typically rely on shared-private architectures, which suffer from limited capacity of private parameters and lack explicit adaptation mechanisms. To address these limitations, we introduce MOTIF for efficient few-shot cross-embodiment transfer that decouples embodiment-agnostic spatiotemporal patterns, termed action motifs, from heterogeneous action data. Specifically, MOTIF first learns unified motifs via vector quantization with progress-aware alignment and embodiment adversarial constraints to ensure temporal and cross-embodiment consistency. We then design a lightweight predictor that predicts these motifs from real-time inputs to guide a flow-matching policy, fusing them with robot-specific states to enable action generation on new embodiments. Evaluations across both simulation and real-world environments validate the superiority of MOTIF, which significantly outperforms strong baselines in few-shot transfer scenarios by 6.5% in simulation and 43.7% in real-world settings. Code is available at https://github.com/buduz/MOTIF.
tldr: The paper introduces MOTIF, a method for few-shot cross-embodiment transfer in robotics that learns embodiment-agnostic action motifs and uses them to guide a flow-matching policy, demonstrating significant performance improvements in both simulation and real-world settings.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MOTIF，一种用于机器人领域少量样本跨具身转移的方法，它学习与环境无关的动作基元，并使用这些基元来指导流动匹配策略，在模拟和现实环境中都表现出显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 尽管视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型推动了通用机器人学习的发展，但由于运动学异构性和收集足够多的真实世界演示来支持微调的高昂成本，跨具身转移仍然具有挑战性。现有的跨具身策略通常依赖于共享-私有架构，这种架构存在私有参数容量有限和缺乏显式适应机制的问题。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了用于高效小样本跨具身转移的MOTIF，它将与具身无关的时空模式（称为动作模序）与异构动作数据解耦。具体而言，MOTIF首先通过矢量量化以及进度感知对齐和具身对抗约束来学习统一的动作模序，以确保时间和跨具身一致性。然后我们设计了一个轻量级的预测器，从实时输入预测这些动作模序，以指导流匹配策略，并将它们与机器人特定的状态融合，从而在新具身上实现动作生成。在仿真和真实世界环境中的评估验证了MOTIF的优越性，它在小样本转移场景中显著优于强大的基线方法，在仿真中提高了6.5%，在真实世界环境中提高了43.7%。代码可在https://github.com/buduz/MOTIF获取。

title: The More the Merrier: Running Multiple Neuromorphic Components On-Chip for Robotic Control
summary: It has long been realized that neuromorphic hardware offers benefits for the domain of robotics such as low energy, low latency, as well as unique methods of learning. In aiming for more complex tasks, especially those incorporating multimodal data, one hurdle continuing to prevent their realization is an inability to orchestrate multiple networks on neuromorphic hardware without resorting to off-chip process management logic. To address this, we show a first example of a pipeline for vision-based robot control in which numerous complex networks can be run entirely on hardware via the use of a spiking neural state machine for process orchestration. The pipeline is validated on the Intel Loihi 2 research chip. We show that all components can run concurrently on-chip in the milli Watt regime at latencies competitive with the state-of-the-art. An equivalent network on simulated hardware is shown to accomplish robotic arm plug insertion in simulation, and the core elements of the pipeline are additionally tested on a real robotic arm.
tldr: The paper presents a fully on-chip neuromorphic pipeline for vision-based robot control, demonstrating concurrent execution of multiple networks using a spiking neural state machine on the Intel Loihi 2, achieving competitive latency and low power consumption.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个完全片上的神经形态视觉机器人控制流水线，展示了使用脉冲神经网络状态机在 Intel Loihi 2 上并发执行多个网络，实现了具有竞争力的延迟和低功耗。
summary_zh: 人们早已认识到，神经形态硬件为机器人领域提供了诸多优势，例如低功耗、低延迟以及独特的学习方法。然而，在追求更复杂的任务，尤其是那些包含多模态数据的任务时，一个持续阻碍其实现的障碍是无法在神经形态硬件上协调多个网络，而不得不求助于片外进程管理逻辑。为了解决这个问题，我们展示了一个基于视觉的机器人控制流水线的首个实例，其中可以通过使用脉冲神经网络状态机进行进程编排，完全在硬件上运行大量复杂网络。该流水线在英特尔的Loihi 2研究芯片上得到验证。我们证明了所有组件都可以在毫瓦级别功耗下，以与最先进技术相当的延迟在片上并发运行。一个在仿真硬件上的等效网络被证明可以在仿真中完成机器人手臂的插头插入任务，并且该流水线的核心要素还在真实的机器人手臂上进行了测试。

title: HybridFlow: A Two-Step Generative Policy for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Limited by inference latency, existing robot manipulation policies lack sufficient real-time interaction capability with the environment. Although faster generation methods such as flow matching are gradually replacing diffusion methods, researchers are pursuing even faster generation suitable for interactive robot control. MeanFlow, as a one-step variant of flow matching, has shown strong potential in image generation, but its precision in action generation does not meet the stringent requirements of robotic manipulation. We therefore propose \textbf{HybridFlow}, a \textbf{3-stage method} with \textbf{2-NFE}: Global Jump in MeanFlow mode, ReNoise for distribution alignment, and Local Refine in ReFlow mode. This method balances inference speed and generation quality by leveraging the rapid advantage of MeanFlow one-step generation while ensuring action precision with minimal generation steps. Through real-world experiments, HybridFlow outperforms the 16-step Diffusion Policy by \textbf{15--25\%} in success rate while reducing inference time from 152ms to 19ms (\textbf{8$\times$ speedup}, \textbf{$\sim$52Hz}); it also achieves 70.0\% success on unseen-color OOD grasping and 66.3\% on deformable object folding. We envision HybridFlow as a practical low-latency method to enhance real-world interaction capabilities of robotic manipulation policies.
tldr: The paper introduces HybridFlow, a novel 3-stage, 2-NFE method combining MeanFlow and ReFlow for faster and more precise robotic manipulation, achieving significant speedups and success rate improvements compared to diffusion policies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新颖的 HybridFlow 方法，它结合了 MeanFlow 和 ReFlow，通过三阶段两步生成策略，实现了更快更精确的机器人操作。与扩散策略相比，该方法显著提升了速度和成功率。
summary_zh: 受推理延迟限制，现有的机器人操作策略缺乏与环境进行充分实时交互的能力。尽管诸如流匹配等更快的生成方法正逐渐取代扩散方法，但研究人员正在追求更快的、适用于交互式机器人控制的生成方式。MeanFlow作为流匹配的一种单步变体，在图像生成方面显示出强大的潜力，但其在动作生成方面的精度未能满足机器人操作的严格要求。因此，我们提出了 \textbf{HybridFlow}，一种具有 \textbf{2-NFE} 的 \textbf{3 阶段方法}： MeanFlow 模式下的全局跳跃（Global Jump），用于分布对齐的重噪声（ReNoise），以及 ReFlow 模式下的局部精修（Local Refine）。该方法通过利用 MeanFlow 单步生成的快速优势，同时以最少的生成步骤确保动作精度，从而平衡了推理速度和生成质量。通过真实世界的实验，HybridFlow 在成功率方面优于 16 步扩散策略 \textbf{15--25\%}，同时将推理时间从 152 毫秒减少到 19 毫秒（\textbf{8 倍加速}，\textbf{$\sim$52Hz}）；它还在未见过的颜色 OOD 抓取任务上实现了 70.0\% 的成功率，在可变形物体折叠任务上实现了 66.3\% 的成功率。我们认为 HybridFlow 是一种实用的低延迟方法，可以增强机器人操作策略的真实世界交互能力。

title: A Kung Fu Athlete Bot That Can Do It All Day: Highly Dynamic, Balance-Challenging Motion Dataset and Autonomous Fall-Resilient Tracking
summary: Current humanoid motion tracking systems can execute routine and moderately dynamic behaviors, yet significant gaps remain near hardware performance limits and algorithmic robustness boundaries. Martial arts represent an extreme case of highly dynamic human motion, characterized by rapid center-of-mass shifts, complex coordination, and abrupt posture transitions. However, datasets tailored to such high-intensity scenarios remain scarce. To address this gap, we construct KungFuAthlete, a high-dynamic martial arts motion dataset derived from professional athletes' daily training videos. The dataset includes ground and jump subsets covering representative complex motion patterns. The jump subset exhibits substantially higher joint, linear, and angular velocities compared to commonly used datasets such as LAFAN1, PHUMA, and AMASS, indicating significantly increased motion intensity and complexity. Importantly, even professional athletes may fail during highly dynamic movements. Similarly, humanoid robots are prone to instability and falls under external disturbances or execution errors. Most prior work assumes motion execution remains within safe states and lacks a unified strategy for modeling unsafe states and enabling reliable autonomous recovery. We propose a novel training paradigm that enables a single policy to jointly learn high-dynamic motion tracking and fall recovery, unifying agile execution and stabilization within one framework. This framework expands robotic capability from pure motion tracking to recovery-enabled execution, promoting more robust and autonomous humanoid performance in real-world high-dynamic scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces KungFuAthlete, a new high-dynamic martial arts motion dataset, and proposes a novel reinforcement learning-based framework that enables humanoid robots to jointly learn high-dynamic motion tracking and fall recovery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的高动态武术运动数据集KungFuAthlete，并提出了一个基于强化学习的框架，使人形机器人能够联合学习高动态运动跟踪和摔倒恢复。
summary_zh: 当前人形机器人运动跟踪系统可以执行常规和适度动态的行为，但在硬件性能极限和算法鲁棒性边界附近仍然存在显著差距。武术代表了一种高度动态的人体运动的极端情况，其特征是快速的质心转移、复杂的协调以及突然的姿势转换。然而，针对这种高强度场景量身定制的数据集仍然稀缺。为了解决这一不足，我们构建了KungFuAthlete，一个从专业运动员的日常训练视频中提取的高动态武术运动数据集。该数据集包含覆盖具有代表性的复杂运动模式的地面和跳跃子集。与常用的数据集（如LAFAN1、PHUMA和AMASS）相比，跳跃子集表现出显著更高的关节、线性和角速度，表明运动强度和复杂性显著提高。重要的是，即使是专业运动员也可能在高度动态的运动中失败。类似地，人形机器人在外部干扰或执行错误下也容易出现不稳定和跌倒。大多数先前的工作假设运动执行保持在安全状态内，并且缺乏用于建模不安全状态并实现可靠自主恢复的统一策略。我们提出了一种新的训练范式，该范式使单一策略能够联合学习高动态运动跟踪和跌倒恢复，从而在一个框架内统一了敏捷执行和稳定。该框架将机器人的能力从纯运动跟踪扩展到支持恢复的执行，从而提升了人形机器人在实际高动态场景中更稳健和自主的性能。

title: AgentRob: From Virtual Forum Agents to Hijacked Physical Robots
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-powered autonomous agents have demonstrated significant capabilities in virtual environments, yet their integration with the physical world remains narrowly confined to direct control interfaces. We present AgentRob, a framework that bridges online community forums, LLM-powered agents, and physical robots through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). AgentRob enables a novel paradigm where autonomous agents participate in online forums--reading posts, extracting natural language commands, dispatching physical robot actions, and reporting results back to the community. The system comprises three layers: a Forum Layer providing asynchronous, persistent, multi-agent interaction; an Agent Layer with forum agents that poll for @mention-targeted commands; and a Robot Layer with VLM-driven controllers and Unitree Go2/G1 hardware that translate commands into robot primitives via iterative tool calling. The framework supports multiple concurrent agents with distinct identities and physical embodiments coexisting in the same forum, establishing the feasibility of forum-mediated multi-agent robot orchestration.
tldr: The paper introduces AgentRob, a framework connecting LLM-powered agents in online forums with physical robots, enabling forum-mediated multi-agent robot orchestration via natural language commands.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AgentRob，一个将在线论坛中由LLM驱动的智能体与物理机器人连接的框架，通过自然语言命令实现论坛介导的多智能体机器人编排。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的自主智能体已经在虚拟环境中展现出显著的能力，然而，它们与物理世界的集成仍然狭隘地局限于直接控制接口。我们提出了AgentRob，一个通过模型上下文协议（MCP）桥接在线社区论坛、LLM驱动的智能体和物理机器人的框架。AgentRob实现了一种新的范式，其中自主智能体参与在线论坛——阅读帖子、提取自然语言命令、调度物理机器人动作，并将结果汇报回社区。该系统包含三个层：一个提供异步、持久、多智能体交互的论坛层；一个包含轮询@mention-targeted命令的论坛智能体的智能体层；以及一个具有VLM驱动控制器和宇树Go2/G1硬件的机器人层，该层通过迭代工具调用将命令转换为机器人底层动作。该框架支持具有不同身份和物理形态的多个并发智能体在同一论坛中共存，从而确立了论坛介导的多智能体机器人编排的可行性。

title: TactAlign: Human-to-Robot Policy Transfer via Tactile Alignment
summary: Human demonstrations collected by wearable devices (e.g., tactile gloves) provide fast and dexterous supervision for policy learning, and are guided by rich, natural tactile feedback. However, a key challenge is how to transfer human-collected tactile signals to robots despite the differences in sensing modalities and embodiment. Existing human-to-robot (H2R) approaches that incorporate touch often assume identical tactile sensors, require paired data, and involve little to no embodiment gap between human demonstrator and the robots, limiting scalability and generality. We propose TactAlign, a cross-embodiment tactile alignment method that transfers human-collected tactile signals to a robot with different embodiment. TactAlign transforms human and robot tactile observations into a shared latent representation using a rectified flow, without paired datasets, manual labels, or privileged information. Our method enables low-cost latent transport guided by hand-object interaction-derived pseudo-pairs. We demonstrate that TactAlign improves H2R policy transfer across multiple contact-rich tasks (pivoting, insertion, lid closing), generalizes to unseen objects and tasks with human data (less than 5 minutes), and enables zero-shot H2R transfer on a highly dexterous tasks (light bulb screwing).
tldr: The paper introduces TactAlign, a method for transferring tactile signals from humans to robots with different embodiments, using rectified flow to create a shared latent representation without requiring paired data or manual labels, enabling improved H2R policy transfer on contact-rich tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种名为TactAlign的方法，用于将人类的触觉信号迁移到具有不同形态的机器人上。该方法使用修正流来创建共享的潜在表征，无需配对数据或手动标签，从而改善了在接触丰富的任务中人到机器人的策略迁移。
summary_zh: 可穿戴设备（如触觉手套）采集的人类演示数据，通过丰富的自然触觉反馈，为策略学习提供快速而灵巧的监督。然而，一个关键挑战是如何将人类采集的触觉信号迁移到机器人，尽管传感模态和形态存在差异。现有的结合触觉的人机（H2R）方法通常假设使用相同的触觉传感器，需要配对数据，并且人机之间形态差异很小甚至没有，这限制了可扩展性和通用性。我们提出TactAlign，一种跨形态的触觉对齐方法，将人类采集的触觉信号迁移到具有不同形态的机器人。 TactAlign使用校正流将人类和机器人的触觉观测转换成一个共享的潜在表征，而无需配对数据集、人工标签或特权信息。我们的方法能够以手-物体交互导出的伪对为指导，实现低成本的潜在空间迁移。我们验证了TactAlign在多个富接触任务（例如，枢轴转动、插入、盖子闭合）中改进了H2R策略迁移，泛化到未见过的物体和具有人类数据（小于5分钟）的任务，并且在高度灵巧的任务（例如，拧灯泡）上实现了零样本H2R迁移。

title: FlowHOI: Flow-based Semantics-Grounded Generation of Hand-Object Interactions for Dexterous Robot Manipulation
summary: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models can generate plausible end-effector motions, yet they often fail in long-horizon, contact-rich tasks because the underlying hand-object interaction (HOI) structure is not explicitly represented. An embodiment-agnostic interaction representation that captures this structure would make manipulation behaviors easier to validate and transfer across robots. We propose FlowHOI, a two-stage flow-matching framework that generates semantically grounded, temporally coherent HOI sequences, comprising hand poses, object poses, and hand-object contact states, conditioned on an egocentric observation, a language instruction, and a 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) scene reconstruction. We decouple geometry-centric grasping from semantics-centric manipulation, conditioning the latter on compact 3D scene tokens and employing a motion-text alignment loss to semantically ground the generated interactions in both the physical scene layout and the language instruction. To address the scarcity of high-fidelity HOI supervision, we introduce a reconstruction pipeline that recovers aligned hand-object trajectories and meshes from large-scale egocentric videos, yielding an HOI prior for robust generation. Across the GRAB and HOT3D benchmarks, FlowHOI achieves the highest action recognition accuracy and a 1.7$\times$ higher physics simulation success rate than the strongest diffusion-based baseline, while delivering a 40$\times$ inference speedup. We further demonstrate real-robot execution on four dexterous manipulation tasks, illustrating the feasibility of retargeting generated HOI representations to real-robot execution pipelines.
tldr: The paper presents FlowHOI, a flow-matching framework for generating semantically grounded hand-object interaction sequences from visual observations and language instructions, achieving state-of-the-art performance in action recognition, physics simulation, and real-robot execution.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了FlowHOI，一个基于流匹配的框架，用于从视觉观测和语言指令生成语义关联的手部-物体交互序列，并在动作识别、物理模拟和真实机器人执行方面实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 近期视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型能够生成看似合理的末端执行器运动，但由于未明确表示潜在的手-物体交互 (HOI) 结构，它们在长时程、接触丰富的任务中往往表现不佳。一种与具体化无关的交互表示能够捕捉这种结构，将使操纵行为更易于验证并在机器人之间转移。我们提出 FlowHOI，一个两阶段的流匹配框架，用于生成语义接地、时间连贯的 HOI 序列，包括手部姿势、物体姿势和手-物体接触状态，并以第一人称视角观测、语言指令和3D高斯溅射 (3DGS) 场景重建为条件。我们将以几何为中心的抓取与以语义为中心的操纵进行解耦，后者以紧凑的 3D 场景tokens为条件，并采用运动-文本对齐损失，以在物理场景布局和语言指令中对生成的交互进行语义接地。为了解决高保真HOI监督的稀缺性问题，我们引入了一个重建流程，从大规模第一人称视角视频中恢复对齐的手-物体轨迹和网格，从而为稳健的生成提供 HOI 先验。在 GRAB 和 HOT3D 基准测试中，FlowHOI 实现了最高的动作识别准确率，并且物理模拟成功率比最强的基于扩散的基线高 1.7$\times$，同时实现了 40$\times$ 的推理速度提升。我们进一步展示了在四个灵巧操纵任务中的真实机器人执行，说明了将生成的 HOI 表示重新定向到真实机器人执行流程的可行性。

title: Imitating What Works: Simulation-Filtered Modular Policy Learning from Human Videos
summary: The ability to learn manipulation skills by watching videos of humans has the potential to unlock a new source of highly scalable data for robot learning. Here, we tackle prehensile manipulation, in which tasks involve grasping an object before performing various post-grasp motions. Human videos offer strong signals for learning the post-grasp motions, but they are less useful for learning the prerequisite grasping behaviors, especially for robots without human-like hands. A promising way forward is to use a modular policy design, leveraging a dedicated grasp generator to produce stable grasps. However, arbitrary stable grasps are often not task-compatible, hindering the robot's ability to perform the desired downstream motion. To address this challenge, we present Perceive-Simulate-Imitate (PSI), a framework for training a modular manipulation policy using human video motion data processed by paired grasp-trajectory filtering in simulation. This simulation step extends the trajectory data with grasp suitability labels, which allows for supervised learning of task-oriented grasping capabilities. We show through real-world experiments that our framework can be used to learn precise manipulation skills efficiently without any robot data, resulting in significantly more robust performance than using a grasp generator naively.
tldr: The paper introduces Perceive-Simulate-Imitate (PSI), a framework that uses simulation to filter grasp-trajectory pairs from human videos for training modular robot manipulation policies, resulting in improved real-world performance without robot data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Perceive-Simulate-Imitate (PSI) 的框架，该框架利用模拟来过滤人类视频中的抓取-轨迹对，以训练模块化的机器人操作策略，从而在不需要机器人数据的情况下提高现实世界的性能。
summary_zh: 通过观看人类视频学习操作技能，有望为机器人学习开启一种高度可扩展的数据新来源。本文探讨抓取操作，其中任务包括在执行各种抓取后动作之前先抓住物体。人类视频为学习抓取后动作提供了强烈的信号，但对于学习先决条件的抓取行为，尤其是在没有类似人类手部的机器人上，效果较差。一种有希望的前进方式是使用模块化的策略设计，利用专用抓取生成器来产生稳定的抓取。然而，任意的稳定抓取通常与任务不兼容，从而阻碍了机器人执行所需下游动作的能力。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出“感知-模拟-模仿（PSI）”框架，该框架使用经过配对抓取-轨迹过滤模拟处理的人类视频运动数据来训练模块化操作策略。该模拟步骤用抓取适用性标签扩展轨迹数据，从而允许监督学习面向任务的抓取能力。通过真实世界的实验，我们表明我们的框架可以在没有任何机器人数据的情况下有效地学习精确的操作技能，从而比单纯使用抓取生成器产生显著更稳健的性能。

title: Mean Flow Policy with Instantaneous Velocity Constraint for One-step Action Generation
summary: Learning expressive and efficient policy functions is a promising direction in reinforcement learning (RL). While flow-based policies have recently proven effective in modeling complex action distributions with a fast deterministic sampling process, they still face a trade-off between expressiveness and computational burden, which is typically controlled by the number of flow steps. In this work, we propose mean velocity policy (MVP), a new generative policy function that models the mean velocity field to achieve the fastest one-step action generation. To ensure its high expressiveness, an instantaneous velocity constraint (IVC) is introduced on the mean velocity field during training. We theoretically prove that this design explicitly serves as a crucial boundary condition, thereby improving learning accuracy and enhancing policy expressiveness. Empirically, our MVP achieves state-of-the-art success rates across several challenging robotic manipulation tasks from Robomimic and OGBench. It also delivers substantial improvements in training and inference speed over existing flow-based policy baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces a new reinforcement learning policy called Mean Velocity Policy (MVP) for robotic manipulation. MVP uses a mean velocity field with an instantaneous velocity constraint (IVC) to achieve one-step action generation, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in robotic manipulation tasks with improved speed.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为平均速度策略 (MVP) 的新型强化学习策略，用于机器人操作。 MVP 使用具有瞬时速度约束 (IVC) 的平均速度场来实现单步动作生成，并在机器人操作任务中展示了最先进的性能，并提高了速度。
summary_zh: 学习富有表现力且高效的策略函数是强化学习 (RL) 中一个有前景的方向。虽然基于流的策略最近已被证明在建模具有快速确定性采样过程的复杂动作分布方面有效，但它们仍然面临着表现力和计算负担之间的权衡，这种权衡通常由流步骤的数量控制。在这项工作中，我们提出了平均速度策略 (MVP)，一种新的生成策略函数，它通过建模平均速度场来实现最快的单步动作生成。为了确保其高表现力，在训练期间对平均速度场引入瞬时速度约束 (IVC)。我们从理论上证明，这种设计明确地充当着一个关键的边界条件，从而提高了学习精度并增强了策略的表现力。在实验上，我们的 MVP 在来自 Robomimic 和 OGBench 的几个具有挑战性的机器人操作任务中实现了最先进的成功率。与现有的基于流的策略基线相比，它还在训练和推理速度方面提供了显著的改进。

title: PhGPO: Pheromone-Guided Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Tool Planning
summary: Recent advancements in Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in executing complex tasks through tool use. However, long-horizon multi-step tool planning is challenging, because the exploration space suffers from a combinatorial explosion. In this scenario, even when a correct tool-use path is found, it is usually considered an immediate reward for current training, which would not provide any reusable information for subsequent training. In this paper, we argue that historically successful trajectories contain reusable tool-transition patterns, which can be leveraged throughout the whole training process. Inspired by ant colony optimization where historically successful paths can be reflected by the pheromone, we propose Pheromone-Guided Policy Optimization (PhGPO), which learns a trajectory-based transition pattern (i.e., pheromone) from historical trajectories and then uses the learned pheromone to guide policy optimization. This learned pheromone provides explicit and reusable guidance that steers policy optimization toward historically successful tool transitions, thereby improving long-horizon tool planning. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed PhGPO.
tldr: The paper introduces PhGPO, a novel approach to long-horizon tool planning for LLM agents, inspired by ant colony optimization. It learns pheromone-guided tool transition patterns to improve policy optimization in complex tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 PhGPO，一种用于 LLM 智能体进行长时程工具规划的新方法，其灵感来自蚁群优化。它学习信息素引导的工具转换模式，以改进复杂任务中的策略优化。
summary_zh: 大规模语言模型（LLM）智能体在通过工具使用执行复杂任务方面展现出强大的能力。然而，长程多步工具规划极具挑战性，因为探索空间遭受组合爆炸。在这种情况下，即使找到正确的工具使用路径，通常也只被视为当前训练的即时奖励，而不会为后续训练提供任何可重用的信息。本文认为，历史上成功的轨迹蕴含着可重用的工具转换模式，这些模式可以在整个训练过程中加以利用。受蚁群优化算法的启发，其中历史上成功的路径可以通过信息素来反映，我们提出了信息素引导的策略优化（PhGPO），它从历史轨迹中学习一种基于轨迹的转换模式（即信息素），然后利用学习到的信息素来引导策略优化。这种学习到的信息素提供了明确且可重用的指导，引导策略优化向历史上成功的工具转换方向发展，从而改善长程工具规划。全面的实验结果证明了我们提出的PhGPO的有效性。

title: MAS-on-the-Fly: Dynamic Adaptation of LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems at Test Time
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as a promising paradigm for solving complex tasks. However, existing works often rely on manual designs or "one-size-fits-all" automation, lacking dynamic adaptability after deployment. Inspired by how biological systems adapt, we introduce MASFly, a novel multi-agent framework enabling dynamic adaptation at test time. To adapt system generation, MASFly employs a retrieval-augmented SOP instantiation mechanism that leverages a self-constructed repository of successful collaboration patterns, enabling the LLM to assemble customized MASs for new queries. For adaptive execution, MASFly incorporates an experience-guided supervision mechanism, where a dedicated Watcher agent monitors system behaviors with reference to a personalized experience pool and provides real-time interventions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MASFly achieves state-of-the-art performance, most notably a 61.7% success rate on the TravelPlanner benchmark, while exhibiting strong task adaptability and robustness.
tldr: The paper introduces MASFly, a framework for dynamically adapting LLM-based multi-agent systems at test time using retrieval-augmented SOP instantiation and experience-guided supervision, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the TravelPlanner benchmark.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MASFly，一个用于在测试时动态调整基于LLM的多智能体系统的框架。它使用检索增强的SOP实例化和经验指导的监督，在TravelPlanner基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的多智能体系统（MAS）已经成为解决复杂任务的一种极具前景的范式。然而，现有工作通常依赖于手动设计或“一刀切”的自动化方法，缺乏部署后的动态适应性。受生物系统适应方式的启发，我们引入了 MASFly，一种新颖的多智能体框架，能够在测试时实现动态适应。为了适应系统生成，MASFly 采用了一种检索增强的 SOP 实例化机制，该机制利用一个自构建的成功协作模式库，使 LLM 能够为新的查询组装定制化的 MAS。对于自适应执行，MASFly 纳入了一种经验指导的监督机制，其中一个专门的观察者（Watcher）智能体参照个性化的经验池来监控系统行为，并提供实时干预。大量的实验表明，MASFly 实现了最先进的性能，尤其是在 TravelPlanner 基准测试中达到了 61.7% 的成功率，同时展现出强大的任务适应性和鲁棒性。

title: Building Autonomous GUI Navigation via Agentic-Q Estimation and Step-Wise Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have substantially driven the progress of autonomous agents for Graphical User Interface (GUI). Nevertheless, in real-world applications, GUI agents are often faced with non-stationary environments, leading to high computational costs for data curation and policy optimization. In this report, we introduce a novel MLLM-centered framework for GUI agents, which consists of two components: agentic-Q estimation and step-wise policy optimization. The former one aims to optimize a Q-model that can generate step-wise values to evaluate the contribution of a given action to task completion. The latter one takes step-wise samples from the state-action trajectory as inputs, and optimizes the policy via reinforcement learning with our agentic-Q model. It should be noticed that (i) all state-action trajectories are produced by the policy itself, so that the data collection costs are manageable; (ii) the policy update is decoupled from the environment, ensuring stable and efficient optimization. Empirical evaluations show that our framework endows Ovis2.5-9B with powerful GUI interaction capabilities, achieving remarkable performances on GUI navigation and grounding benchmarks and even surpassing contenders with larger scales.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel framework for autonomous GUI navigation using MLLMs, featuring agentic-Q estimation and step-wise policy optimization, claiming improved performance and efficiency over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于自主GUI导航的新型框架，该框架使用MLLM，具有Agentic-Q估计和逐步策略优化，声称比现有方法具有更高的性能和效率。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）的最新进展极大地推动了图形用户界面（GUI）自主智能体的进步。然而，在实际应用中，GUI智能体常常面临非平稳环境，导致数据整理和策略优化产生高昂的计算成本。在本报告中，我们提出了一种以MLLM为中心的新型GUI智能体框架，该框架由两个组件组成：智能体式Q值估计和步进式策略优化。前者旨在优化一个Q模型，该模型可以生成步进式的值来评估给定动作对任务完成的贡献。后者将来自状态-动作轨迹的步进式样本作为输入，并通过强化学习和我们的智能体式Q模型来优化策略。应该注意的是，（i）所有状态-动作轨迹均由策略自身生成，因此数据收集成本可控；（ii）策略更新与环境解耦，确保稳定高效的优化。经验评估表明，我们的框架赋予了Ovis2.5-9B强大的GUI交互能力，在GUI导航和基础基准测试中取得了显著的性能，甚至超越了更大规模的竞争者。

title: Hippocampus: An Efficient and Scalable Memory Module for Agentic AI
summary: Agentic AI require persistent memory to store user-specific histories beyond the limited context window of LLMs. Existing memory systems use dense vector databases or knowledge-graph traversal (or hybrid), incurring high retrieval latency and poor storage scalability. We introduce Hippocampus, an agentic memory management system that uses compact binary signatures for semantic search and lossless token-ID streams for exact content reconstruction. Its core is a Dynamic Wavelet Matrix (DWM) that compresses and co-indexes both streams to support ultra-fast search in the compressed domain, thus avoiding costly dense-vector or graph computations. This design scales linearly with memory size, making it suitable for long-horizon agentic deployments. Empirically, our evaluation shows that Hippocampus reduces end-to-end retrieval latency by up to 31$\times$ and cuts per-query token footprint by up to 14$\times$, while maintaining accuracy on both LoCoMo and LongMemEval benchmarks.
tldr: The paper introduces Hippocampus, a novel memory management system for agentic AI that uses compact binary signatures and lossless token-ID streams with a Dynamic Wavelet Matrix for faster and more scalable retrieval than existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Hippocampus的新型Agentic AI内存管理系统，该系统使用紧凑的二进制签名和无损token-ID流，结合动态小波矩阵，与现有方法相比，实现了更快、更具可扩展性的检索。
summary_zh: 具身智能AI需要持久性记忆，以存储超出LLM有限上下文窗口的用户特定历史记录。现有的记忆系统使用密集向量数据库或知识图谱遍历（或混合），导致检索延迟高且存储可扩展性差。我们引入了Hippocampus，一种具身智能记忆管理系统，它使用紧凑的二进制签名进行语义搜索，并使用无损的token-ID流进行精确的内容重构。其核心是一个动态小波矩阵（DWM），它压缩并共同索引这两个流，以支持在压缩域中的超快速搜索，从而避免了代价高昂的密集向量或图计算。这种设计随内存大小线性扩展，使其适用于长程具身智能部署。实验结果表明，Hippocampus将端到端检索延迟降低高达31倍，并将每次查询的token占用量减少高达14倍，同时在LoCoMo和LongMemEval基准测试中保持了准确性。

title: REMem: Reasoning with Episodic Memory in Language Agent
summary: Humans excel at remembering concrete experiences along spatiotemporal contexts and performing reasoning across those events, i.e., the capacity for episodic memory. In contrast, memory in language agents remains mainly semantic, and current agents are not yet capable of effectively recollecting and reasoning over interaction histories. We identify and formalize the core challenges of episodic recollection and reasoning from this gap, and observe that existing work often overlooks episodicity, lacks explicit event modeling, or overemphasizes simple retrieval rather than complex reasoning. We present REMem, a two-phase framework for constructing and reasoning with episodic memory: 1) Offline indexing, where REMem converts experiences into a hybrid memory graph that flexibly links time-aware gists and facts. 2) Online inference, where REMem employs an agentic retriever with carefully curated tools for iterative retrieval over the memory graph. Comprehensive evaluation across four episodic memory benchmarks shows that REMem substantially outperforms state-of-the-art memory systems such as Mem0 and HippoRAG 2, showing 3.4% and 13.4% absolute improvements on episodic recollection and reasoning tasks, respectively. Moreover, REMem also demonstrates more robust refusal behavior for unanswerable questions.
tldr: The paper introduces REMem, a framework for equipping language agents with episodic memory capabilities through a hybrid memory graph and agentic retrieval, demonstrating significant improvements in episodic recollection and reasoning tasks compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了REMem，一个通过混合记忆图和代理检索为语言代理配备情景记忆能力的框架。实验表明，与现有方法相比，该框架在情景再现和推理任务中表现出显著的改进。
summary_zh: 人类擅长记忆基于时空背景的具体经历，并在此基础上进行推理，即情景记忆的能力。相比之下，语言代理中的记忆主要停留在语义层面，当前的代理尚无法有效地回忆互动历史并进行推理。我们从这个差距中识别并形式化了情景回忆和推理的核心挑战，并观察到现有工作常常忽略情节性，缺乏显式的事件建模，或者过度强调简单的检索而非复杂的推理。我们提出了REMem，一个用于构建情景记忆并进行推理的两阶段框架：1) 离线索引，REMem将经验转化为混合记忆图，该图灵活地连接了具备时间意识的主旨和事实。2) 在线推理，REMem采用一种代理式检索器，配备精心设计的工具，用于在记忆图上进行迭代检索。在四个情景记忆基准上的全面评估表明，REMem显著优于最先进的记忆系统，如Mem0和HippoRAG 2，在情景回忆和推理任务上分别实现了3.4%和13.4%的绝对提升。此外，REMem在面对无法回答的问题时也表现出更强的鲁棒性拒绝行为。

title: SPILLage: Agentic Oversharing on the Web
summary: LLM-powered agents are beginning to automate user's tasks across the open web, often with access to user resources such as emails and calendars. Unlike standard LLMs answering questions in a controlled ChatBot setting, web agents act "in the wild", interacting with third parties and leaving behind an action trace. Therefore, we ask the question: how do web agents handle user resources when accomplishing tasks on their behalf across live websites? In this paper, we formalize Natural Agentic Oversharing -- the unintentional disclosure of task-irrelevant user information through an agent trace of actions on the web. We introduce SPILLage, a framework that characterizes oversharing along two dimensions: channel (content vs. behavior) and directness (explicit vs. implicit). This taxonomy reveals a critical blind spot: while prior work focuses on text leakage, web agents also overshare behaviorally through clicks, scrolls, and navigation patterns that can be monitored. We benchmark 180 tasks on live e-commerce sites with ground-truth annotations separating task-relevant from task-irrelevant attributes. Across 1,080 runs spanning two agentic frameworks and three backbone LLMs, we demonstrate that oversharing is pervasive with behavioral oversharing dominates content oversharing by 5x. This effect persists -- and can even worsen -- under prompt-level mitigation. However, removing task-irrelevant information before execution improves task success by up to 17.9%, demonstrating that reducing oversharing improves task success. Our findings underscore that protecting privacy in web agents is a fundamental challenge, requiring a broader view of "output" that accounts for what agents do on the web, not just what they type. Our datasets and code are available at https://github.com/jrohsc/SPILLage.
tldr: The paper introduces SPILLage, a framework to analyze unintentional information leakage by LLM-powered web agents through both content and behavior, demonstrating pervasive oversharing and suggesting mitigation strategies to improve task success and privacy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SPILLage，一个用于分析LLM驱动的Web代理无意中泄露信息的框架，通过内容和行为两个方面，展示了普遍存在过度共享，并提出了缓解策略以提高任务成功率和隐私。
summary_zh: 基于LLM的智能体开始在开放网络上自动化用户任务，通常能访问用户的电子邮件和日历等资源。与在受控ChatBot环境中回答问题的标准LLM不同，Web智能体在"野外"行动，与第三方互动并留下行动轨迹。因此，我们提出问题：当Web智能体代表用户在真实网站上完成任务时，它们如何处理用户资源？在本文中，我们形式化了“自然智能体式过度共享”——通过智能体在Web上的行动轨迹无意中披露与任务无关的用户信息。我们引入了SPILLage，这是一个根据两个维度来描述过度共享的框架：通道（内容与行为）和直接性（显式与隐式）。这个分类法揭示了一个关键盲点：虽然之前的工作侧重于文本泄漏，但Web智能体也会通过可被监控的点击、滚动和导航模式以行为方式过度共享。我们使用真实标注区分任务相关和任务无关属性，在真实电商网站上对180个任务进行了基准测试。在横跨两个智能体框架和三个主干LLM的1080次运行中，我们证明过度共享是普遍存在的，行为过度共享比内容过度共享高出5倍。即使在提示层面采取缓解措施，这种影响仍然存在——甚至可能恶化。然而，在执行前删除与任务无关的信息可以将任务成功率提高高达17.9%，表明减少过度共享可以提高任务成功率。我们的研究结果强调，保护Web智能体中的隐私是一个根本性的挑战，需要对“输出”进行更广泛的理解，不仅要考虑智能体输入的内容，还要考虑它们在Web上的行为。我们的数据集和代码可在https://github.com/jrohsc/SPILLage获取。

title: CoPE-VideoLM: Codec Primitives For Efficient Video Language Models
summary: Video Language Models (VideoLMs) empower AI systems to understand temporal dynamics in videos. To fit to the maximum context window constraint, current methods use keyframe sampling which can miss both macro-level events and micro-level details due to the sparse temporal coverage. Furthermore, processing full images and their tokens for each frame incurs substantial computational overhead. To address these limitations, we propose to leverage video codec primitives (specifically motion vectors and residuals) which natively encode video redundancy and sparsity without requiring expensive full-image encoding for most frames. To this end, we introduce lightweight transformer-based encoders that aggregate codec primitives and align their representations with image encoder embeddings through a pre-training strategy that accelerates convergence during end-to-end fine-tuning. Our approach reduces the time-to-first-token by up to $86\%$ and token usage by up to $93\%$ compared to standard VideoLMs. Moreover, by varying the keyframe and codec primitive densities we are able to maintain or exceed performance on $14$ diverse video understanding benchmarks spanning general question answering, temporal reasoning, long-form understanding, and spatial scene understanding.
tldr: This paper introduces CoPE-VideoLM, a method that leverages video codec primitives to improve the efficiency of Video Language Models by reducing computational overhead and token usage while maintaining or exceeding performance on various video understanding benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了CoPE-VideoLM，该方法利用视频编解码器原语来提高视频语言模型的效率，通过减少计算开销和token使用量，同时保持或超过在各种视频理解基准上的性能。
summary_zh: 视频语言模型(VideoLMs)赋能AI系统理解视频中的时序动态。为了适应最大上下文窗口约束，当前方法采用关键帧采样，但由于时序覆盖的稀疏性，可能错过宏观层面的事件和微观层面的细节。此外，处理完整图像及其每个帧的token会产生巨大的计算开销。为了解决这些限制，我们提出利用视频编解码器原语（特别是运动向量和残差），它们本身就编码了视频的冗余性和稀疏性，而无需对大多数帧进行昂贵的完整图像编码。为此，我们引入了基于轻量级Transformer的编码器，用于聚合编解码器原语，并通过预训练策略将它们的表征与图像编码器嵌入对齐，该策略加速了端到端微调期间的收敛。与标准VideoLMs相比，我们的方法将首个token的生成时间缩短了高达86%，并将token使用量减少了高达93%。此外，通过改变关键帧和编解码器原语的密度，我们能够在涵盖一般问答、时序推理、长时理解和空间场景理解的14个不同的视频理解基准测试中保持或超过性能。

title: Embed-RL: Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning-Driven Multimodal Embeddings
summary: Leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has become pivotal for advancing Universal Multimodal Embeddings (UME) in addressing diverse cross-modal tasks. Recent studies demonstrate that incorporating generative Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning can substantially enhance task-specific representations compared to discriminative methods. However, the generated reasoning CoTs of existing generative embedding methods are limited to the textual analysis of queries and are irrelevant to the retrieval of the targets. To address these limitations, we propose a reasoning-driven UME framework that integrates Embedder-Guided Reinforcement Learning (EG-RL) to optimize the Reasoner to produce evidential Traceability CoT (T-CoT). Our key contributions are threefold: (1) We design an EG-RL framework where the Embedder provides explicit supervision to the Reasoner, ensuring the generated CoT traces are aligned with embedding tasks. (2) We introduce T-CoT, which extracts critical multimodal cues to focus on retrieval-relevant elements and provides multimodal inputs for the Embedder. (3) With limited computational resources, our framework outperforms the pioneering embedding model on both MMEB-V2 and UVRB benchmarks. The integration of multimodal evidence in structured reasoning, paired with retrieval-oriented alignment, effectively strengthens cross-modal semantic consistency and boosts the fine-grained matching capability of the model as well as the generalization across complex scenarios. Our work demonstrates that targeted reasoning optimization can significantly improve multimodal embedding quality, providing a practical and efficient solution for reasoning-driven UME development.
tldr: The paper introduces Embed-RL, a reinforcement learning framework that optimizes an MLLM's reasoning process to generate evidential reasoning traces (T-CoT) to improve the quality and cross-modal semantic consistency of universal multimodal embeddings (UME), showing improved performance on MMEB-V2 and UVRB benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Embed-RL，一个使用强化学习框架来优化多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的推理过程，生成证据推理轨迹（T-CoT），从而提高通用多模态嵌入（UME）的质量和跨模态语义一致性的方法。实验表明，该方法在MMEB-V2和UVRB基准测试上表现更优异。
summary_zh: 利用多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)已成为推进通用多模态嵌入(UME)以解决各种跨模态任务的关键。 近期研究表明，与判别式方法相比，融合生成式思维链(CoT)推理能显著增强特定任务表征。 然而，现有生成式嵌入方法生成的推理CoT仅限于queries的文本分析，与targets的检索无关。 为解决这些局限，我们提出了一种推理驱动的UME框架，该框架集成了Embedder引导的强化学习(EG-RL)，以优化推理器产生佐证可追溯性CoT(T-CoT)。我们的主要贡献在于三个方面：（1）我们设计了一个EG-RL框架，其中Embedder为Reasoner提供显式监督，确保生成的CoT traces与嵌入任务对齐。(2）我们引入了T-CoT，它提取关键的多模态线索以专注于检索相关的元素，并为Embedder提供多模态输入。(3）在有限的计算资源下，我们的框架在MMEB-V2和UVRB基准测试中均优于先驱嵌入模型。在结构化推理中整合多模态证据，并结合面向检索的对齐，有效地加强了跨模态语义一致性，提升了模型的细粒度匹配能力以及在复杂场景中的泛化能力。 我们的工作表明，有针对性的推理优化能够显著提高多模态嵌入质量，为推理驱动的UME开发提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: A generalizable foundation model for intraoperative understanding across surgical procedures
summary: In minimally invasive surgery, clinical decisions depend on real-time visual interpretation, yet intraoperative perception varies substantially across surgeons and procedures. This variability limits consistent assessment, training, and the development of reliable artificial intelligence systems, as most surgical AI models are designed for narrowly defined tasks and do not generalize across procedures or institutions. Here we introduce ZEN, a generalizable foundation model for intraoperative surgical video understanding trained on more than 4 million frames from over 21 procedures using a self-supervised multi-teacher distillation framework. We curated a large and diverse dataset and systematically evaluated multiple representation learning strategies within a unified benchmark. Across 20 downstream tasks and full fine-tuning, frozen-backbone, few-shot and zero-shot settings, ZEN consistently outperforms existing surgical foundation models and demonstrates robust cross-procedure generalization. These results suggest a step toward unified representations for surgical scene understanding and support future applications in intraoperative assistance and surgical training assessment.
tldr: The paper introduces ZEN, a generalizable foundation model for surgical video understanding trained on a large, diverse dataset. It demonstrates superior performance across various surgical tasks and generalization across procedures.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为ZEN的通用手术视频理解基础模型，该模型在一个大型多样化的数据集上进行训练。它在各种手术任务中表现出卓越的性能，并能跨手术流程进行泛化。
summary_zh: 在微创手术中，临床决策依赖于实时的视觉解读，然而术中感知在不同外科医生和手术之间存在显著差异。这种差异性限制了一致的评估、培训和可靠人工智能系统的开发，因为大多数手术AI模型都是为狭义定义的任务设计的，并且无法跨手术或机构推广。在此，我们介绍ZEN，一种用于术中手术视频理解的通用基础模型，它使用自监督的多教师蒸馏框架，在来自超过21种手术的400多万帧图像上进行训练。我们整理了一个大型且多样化的数据集，并在统一的基准测试中系统地评估了多种表征学习策略。在20个下游任务以及完全微调、冻结骨干网络、少样本和零样本设置中，ZEN始终优于现有的手术基础模型，并展示了强大的跨手术泛化能力。这些结果表明朝着手术场景理解的统一表征迈出了一步，并为术中辅助和手术培训评估的未来应用提供支持。

title: Towards Sparse Video Understanding and Reasoning
summary: We present \revise (\underline{Re}asoning with \underline{Vi}deo \underline{S}parsity), a multi-round agent for video question answering (VQA). Instead of uniformly sampling frames, \revise selects a small set of informative frames, maintains a summary-as-state across rounds, and stops early when confident. It supports proprietary vision-language models (VLMs) in a ``plug-and-play'' setting and enables reinforcement fine-tuning for open-source models. For fine-tuning, we introduce EAGER (Evidence-Adjusted Gain for Efficient Reasoning), an annotation-free reward with three terms: (1) Confidence gain: after new frames are added, we reward the increase in the log-odds gap between the correct option and the strongest alternative; (2) Summary sufficiency: at answer time we re-ask using only the last committed summary and reward success; (3) Correct-and-early stop: answering correctly within a small turn budget is rewarded. Across multiple VQA benchmarks, \revise improves accuracy while reducing frames, rounds, and prompt tokens, demonstrating practical sparse video reasoning.
tldr: The paper introduces ReVISe, a multi-round agent for video question answering that sparsely selects informative frames, maintains a summary, and uses a novel reinforcement learning reward function (EAGER) for fine-tuning achieving improved accuracy with fewer resources.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍ReVISe，一种用于视频问答的多轮代理，它稀疏地选择信息丰富的帧，维护摘要，并使用一种新的强化学习奖励函数（EAGER）进行微调，从而以更少的资源实现了更高的准确性。
summary_zh: 我们提出了\revise（\underline{Re}asoning with \underline{Vi}deo \underline{S}parsity，即视频稀疏推理），一种用于视频问答(VQA)的多轮代理。与均匀采样帧不同，\revise选择一小部分信息丰富的帧，在多轮交互中维护一个摘要作为状态，并在有把握时提前停止。它支持专有的视觉-语言模型(VLMs)以“即插即用”的方式，并为开源模型实现强化微调。对于微调，我们引入了EAGER（Evidence-Adjusted Gain for Efficient Reasoning，即证据调整增益的高效推理），一种无标注的奖励，包含三个部分：（1）置信度增益：在新帧添加后，我们奖励正确选项与最强替代选项之间的对数几率差距的增加；（2）摘要充分性：在回答问题时，我们仅使用最后承诺的摘要重新提问，并奖励成功；（3）正确且提前停止：在较小的轮次预算内正确回答会得到奖励。在多个VQA基准测试中，\revise在提高准确率的同时，减少了帧数、轮数和提示令牌数量，展示了实用的稀疏视频推理。

title: AdaVBoost: Mitigating Hallucinations in LVLMs via Token-Level Adaptive Visual Attention Boosting
summary: Visual attention boosting has emerged as a promising direction for mitigating hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), where existing methods primarily focus on where to boost by applying a predefined scaling to the attention of method-specific visual tokens during autoregressive generation. In this paper, we identify a fundamental trade-off in these methods: a predefined scaling factor can be too weak at some generation steps, leaving hallucinations unresolved, yet too strong at others, leading to new hallucinations. Motivated by this finding, we propose AdaVBoost, a token-level visual attention boosting framework that adaptively determines how much attention to boost at each generation step. Specifically, we introduce Visual Grounding Entropy (VGE) to estimate hallucination risk, which leverages visual grounding as a complementary signal to capture evidence mismatches beyond entropy. Guided by VGE, AdaVBoost applies stronger visual attention boosting to high-risk tokens and weaker boosting to low-risk tokens, enabling token-level adaptive intervention at each generation step. Extensive experiments show that AdaVBoost significantly outperforms baseline methods across multiple LVLMs and hallucination benchmarks.
tldr: The paper introduces AdaVBoost, a token-level adaptive visual attention boosting framework for mitigating hallucinations in LVLMs by using Visual Grounding Entropy to estimate hallucination risk and adaptively adjust attention boosting at each generation step.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 AdaVBoost，一种令牌级自适应视觉注意力增强框架，通过使用视觉基础熵来估计 LVLM 中的幻觉风险，并在每个生成步骤中自适应地调整注意力增强，从而减轻幻觉。
summary_zh: 视觉注意力增强已成为缓解大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）中幻觉现象的一个有前景的方向。现有方法主要集中于“在哪里增强”，通过在自回归生成过程中，对方法特定的视觉token的注意力应用预定义的缩放比例来实现。在本文中，我们发现这些方法存在一个根本性的权衡：预定义的缩放因子在某些生成步骤可能过于微弱，导致幻觉无法解决；而在另一些步骤中又可能过于强烈，从而产生新的幻觉。受此启发，我们提出了AdaVBoost，一种token级别的视觉注意力增强框架，它能够在每个生成步骤自适应地确定增强多少注意力。具体而言，我们引入了视觉定位熵（VGE）来估计幻觉风险，它利用视觉定位作为互补信号，以捕捉熵之外的证据不匹配。在VGE的指导下，AdaVBoost对高风险token应用更强的视觉注意力增强，对低风险token应用较弱的增强，从而在每个生成步骤实现token级别的自适应干预。大量实验表明，AdaVBoost在多个LVLMs和幻觉基准测试中显著优于基线方法。

title: HBVLA: Pushing 1-Bit Post-Training Quantization for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable instruction-following embodied control, but their large compute and memory footprints hinder deployment on resource-constrained robots and edge platforms. While reducing weights to 1-bit precision through binarization can greatly improve efficiency, existing methods fail to narrow the distribution gap between binarized and full-precision weights, causing quantization errors to accumulate under long-horizon closed-loop execution and severely degrade actions. To fill this gap, we propose HBVLA, a VLA-tailored binarization framework. First, we use a policy-aware enhanced Hessian to identify weights that are truly critical for action generation. Then, we employ a sparse orthogonal transform for non-salient weights to induce a low-entropy intermediate state. Finally, we quantize both salient and non-salient weights in the Harr domain with group-wise 1-bit quantization. We have evaluated our approach on different VLAs: on LIBERO, quantized OpenVLA-OFT retains 92.2% of full-precision performance; on SimplerEnv, quantized CogAct retains 93.6%, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art binarization methods. We further validate our method on real-world evaluation suite and the results show that HBVLA incurs only marginal success-rate degradation compared to the full-precision model, demonstrating robust deployability under tight hardware constraints. Our work provides a practical foundation for ultra-low-bit quantization of VLAs, enabling more reliable deployment on hardware-limited robotic platforms.
tldr: The paper introduces HBVLA, a novel 1-bit post-training quantization framework specifically designed for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, addressing the deployment challenges of these models on resource-constrained robotic platforms. It achieves high performance on various VLA tasks while significantly reducing computational cost and memory footprint.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了HBVLA，一种专为视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型设计的1比特后训练量化框架，旨在解决这些模型在资源受限的机器人平台上部署所面临的挑战。它在各种VLA任务上实现了高性能，同时显著降低了计算成本和内存占用。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型能够实现遵循指令的具身控制，但其庞大的计算和内存占用阻碍了在资源受限的机器人和边缘平台上的部署。虽然通过二值化将权重降低到 1 比特精度可以显著提高效率，但现有方法未能缩小二值化权重与全精度权重之间的分布差距，导致量化误差在长时程闭环执行中累积，并严重降低动作性能。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出 HBVLA，一种专为 VLA 定制的二值化框架。首先，我们使用一个策略感知的增强 Hessian 矩阵来识别对动作生成真正至关重要的权重。然后，我们对非显著权重采用稀疏正交变换，以诱导一个低熵中间状态。最后，我们在 Harr 域中对显著和非显著权重都采用分组 1 比特量化。我们在不同的 VLA 上评估了我们的方法：在 LIBERO 上，量化的 OpenVLA-OFT 保留了 92.2% 的全精度性能；在 SimplerEnv 上，量化的 CogAct 保留了 93.6%，显著优于最先进的二值化方法。我们进一步在一个真实世界的评估套件上验证了我们的方法，结果表明，与全精度模型相比，HBVLA 只会造成极小的成功率下降，这证明了在严格的硬件约束下的稳健可部署性。我们的工作为 VLA 的超低比特量化提供了实践基础，从而能够在硬件受限的机器人平台上进行更可靠的部署。

title: Near-Optimal Regret for Policy Optimization in Contextual MDPs with General Offline Function Approximation
summary: We introduce \texttt{OPO-CMDP}, the first policy optimization algorithm for stochastic Contextual Markov Decision Process (CMDPs) under general offline function approximation. Our approach achieves a high probability regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(H^4\sqrt{T|S||A|\log(|\mathcal{F}||\mathcal{P}|)}),$ where $S$ and $A$ denote the state and action spaces, $H$ the horizon length, $T$ the number of episodes, and $\mathcal{F}, \mathcal{P}$ the finite function classes used to approximate the losses and dynamics, respectively. This is the first regret bound with optimal dependence on $|S|$ and $|A|$, directly improving the current state-of-the-art (Qian, Hu, and Simchi-Levi, 2024). These results demonstrate that optimistic policy optimization provides a natural, computationally superior and theoretically near-optimal path for solving CMDPs.
tldr: The paper introduces OPO-CMDP, a policy optimization algorithm for Contextual Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) with offline function approximation, achieving a near-optimal regret bound and improving upon existing state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OPO-CMDP，一种用于上下文马尔可夫决策过程（CMDPs）的策略优化算法，具有离线函数逼近能力，实现了接近最优的遗憾界限，并改进了现有的最先进结果。
summary_zh: 我们提出了\texttt{OPO-CMDP}，这是首个针对随机上下文马尔可夫决策过程(CMDP) 的策略优化算法，它适用于一般的离线函数逼近。我们的方法实现了概率至少为 $1-\delta$ 的界 $\widetilde{O}(H^4\sqrt{T|S||A|\log(|\mathcal{F}||\mathcal{P}|)})$，其中$S$和$A$分别表示状态空间和动作空间，$H$表示时间范围长度，$T$ 表示回合数，$\mathcal{F}$和$\mathcal{P}$分别表示用于逼近损失函数和动力学模型的有限函数类。这是首个在$|S|$和$|A|$上具有最优依赖性的悔恨界，直接改进了当前最先进的结果 (Qian, Hu, and Simchi-Levi, 2024)。这些结果表明，乐观策略优化为解决CMDP问题提供了一条自然、计算上更优越且理论上近乎最优的途径。

title: Gaussian Sequences with Multi-Scale Dynamics for 4D Reconstruction from Monocular Casual Videos
summary: Understanding dynamic scenes from casual videos is critical for scalable robot learning, yet four-dimensional (4D) reconstruction under strictly monocular settings remains highly ill-posed. To address this challenge, our key insight is that real-world dynamics exhibits a multi-scale regularity from object to particle level. To this end, we design the multi-scale dynamics mechanism that factorizes complex motion fields. Within this formulation, we propose Gaussian sequences with multi-scale dynamics, a novel representation for dynamic 3D Gaussians derived through compositions of multi-level motion. This layered structure substantially alleviates ambiguity of reconstruction and promotes physically plausible dynamics. We further incorporate multi-modal priors from vision foundation models to establish complementary supervision, constraining the solution space and improving the reconstruction fidelity. Our approach enables accurate and globally consistent 4D reconstruction from monocular casual videos. Experiments of dynamic novel-view synthesis (NVS) on benchmark and real-world manipulation datasets demonstrate considerable improvements over existing methods.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel 4D reconstruction method from monocular videos using multi-scale Gaussian sequences and vision foundation model priors, achieving improved dynamic novel-view synthesis.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于单目视频的4D重建方法，该方法利用多尺度高斯序列和视觉基础模型先验知识，实现了改进的动态新视角合成。
summary_zh: 从随意的视频中理解动态场景，对于可扩展的机器人学习至关重要，然而，严格的单目设置下的四维（4D）重建仍然是高度不适定的。为了应对这一挑战，我们的关键洞察在于，真实世界的动态展现出从物体到粒子层面的多尺度规律性。为此，我们设计了多尺度动态机制来分解复杂的运动场。在此框架下，我们提出了具有多尺度动态的高斯序列，一种通过多层运动组合得到的动态3D高斯的新颖表示。这种分层结构极大地缓解了重建的模糊性，并促进了物理上合理的动力学。我们进一步整合了来自视觉基础模型的多模态先验，以建立互补的监督，约束解空间并提高重建的保真度。我们的方法能够从单目随意视频中实现准确且全局一致的4D重建。在基准数据集和真实世界操作数据集上的动态新视角合成（NVS）实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法取得了显著的改进。

title: Symmetry-Aware Fusion of Vision and Tactile Sensing via Bilateral Force Priors for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Insertion tasks in robotic manipulation demand precise, contact-rich interactions that vision alone cannot resolve. While tactile feedback is intuitively valuable, existing studies have shown that naïve visuo-tactile fusion often fails to deliver consistent improvements. In this work, we propose a Cross-Modal Transformer (CMT) for visuo-tactile fusion that integrates wrist-camera observations with tactile signals through structured self- and cross-attention. To stabilize tactile embeddings, we further introduce a physics-informed regularization that encourages bilateral force balance, reflecting principles of human motor control. Experiments on the TacSL benchmark show that CMT with symmetry regularization achieves a 96.59% insertion success rate, surpassing naïve and gated fusion baselines and closely matching the privileged "wrist + contact force" configuration (96.09%). These results highlight two central insights: (i) tactile sensing is indispensable for precise alignment, and (ii) principled multimodal fusion, further strengthened by physics-informed regularization, unlocks complementary strengths of vision and touch, approaching privileged performance under realistic sensing.
tldr: This paper introduces a Cross-Modal Transformer (CMT) with bilateral force regularization for visuo-tactile fusion in robotic insertion tasks, achieving near-privileged performance by effectively combining vision and tactile feedback.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种带有双边力正则化的跨模态 Transformer (CMT)，用于机器人插入任务中的视觉-触觉融合。通过有效结合视觉和触觉反馈，实现了接近特权配置的性能。
summary_zh: 机器人操作中的插入任务需要精确的、富含接触的交互，仅靠视觉无法完成。虽然触觉反馈在直觉上很有价值，但现有研究表明，简单的视觉-触觉融合往往无法带来持续的改进。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视觉-触觉融合的跨模态Transformer (CMT)，它通过结构化的自注意力和交叉注意力将腕部相机观测与触觉信号集成起来。为了稳定触觉嵌入，我们进一步引入了一种基于物理信息的正则化方法，以鼓励双边力平衡，反映人类运动控制的原理。在TacSL基准测试上的实验表明，带有对称性正则化的CMT实现了96.59%的插入成功率，超过了简单融合和门控融合基线，并与特权的“腕部+接触力”配置 (96.09%) 非常接近。这些结果突出了两个核心观点：（i）触觉传感对于精确对准是不可或缺的；（ii）有原则的多模态融合，通过基于物理信息的正则化进一步加强，能够释放视觉和触觉的互补优势，在现实感知条件下接近特权性能。

title: SPLIT: Sparse Incremental Learning of Error Dynamics for Control-Oriented Modeling in Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Accurate, computationally efficient, and adaptive vehicle models are essential for autonomous vehicle control. Hybrid models that combine a nominal model with a Gaussian Process (GP)-based residual model have emerged as a promising approach. However, the GP-based residual model suffers from the curse of dimensionality, high evaluation complexity, and the inefficiency of online learning, which impede the deployment in real-time vehicle controllers. To address these challenges, we propose SPLIT, a sparse incremental learning framework for control-oriented vehicle dynamics modeling. SPLIT integrates three key innovations: (i) Model Decomposition. We decompose the vehicle model into invariant elements calibrated by experiments, and variant elements compensated by the residual model to reduce feature dimensionality. (ii) Local Incremental Learning. We define the valid region in the feature space and partition it into subregions, enabling efficient online learning from streaming data. (iii) GP Sparsification. We use bayesian committee machine to ensure scalable online evaluation. Integrated into model-based controllers, SPLIT is evaluated in aggressive simulations and real-vehicle experiments. Results demonstrate that SPLIT improves model accuracy and control performance online. Moreover, it enables rapid adaptation to vehicle dynamics deviations and exhibits robust generalization to previously unseen scenarios.
tldr: The paper proposes SPLIT, a sparse incremental learning framework for adaptive vehicle dynamics modeling using decomposed Gaussian Processes, designed for real-time autonomous vehicle control applications.
tldr_zh: 本文提出SPLIT，一个稀疏增量学习框架，利用分解的高斯过程进行自适应车辆动力学建模，专为实时自动驾驶车辆控制应用而设计。
summary_zh: 精确、计算高效且自适应的车辆模型对于自动驾驶车辆控制至关重要。将标称模型与基于高斯过程(GP)的残差模型相结合的混合模型已成为一种有前景的方法。然而，基于GP的残差模型面临维度诅咒、高评估复杂性和在线学习效率低下的问题，这阻碍了其在实时车辆控制器中的部署。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出SPLIT，一种面向控制的车辆动力学建模的稀疏增量学习框架。SPLIT集成了三项关键创新：(i) 模型分解。我们将车辆模型分解为通过实验校准的不变元素，以及由残差模型补偿的可变元素，以降低特征维度。(ii) 局部增量学习。我们定义了特征空间中的有效区域并将其划分为子区域，从而能够从流数据中进行高效的在线学习。(iii) GP稀疏化。我们使用贝叶斯委员会机来确保可扩展的在线评估。SPLIT被集成到基于模型的控制器中，并在激进的仿真和真实车辆实验中进行了评估。结果表明，SPLIT能够在线提高模型精度和控制性能。此外，它能够快速适应车辆动力学偏差，并对以前未见过的场景表现出强大的泛化能力。

title: Hierarchical Audio-Visual-Proprioceptive Fusion for Precise Robotic Manipulation
summary: Existing robotic manipulation methods primarily rely on visual and proprioceptive observations, which may struggle to infer contact-related interaction states in partially observable real-world environments. Acoustic cues, by contrast, naturally encode rich interaction dynamics during contact, yet remain underexploited in current multimodal fusion literature. Most multimodal fusion approaches implicitly assume homogeneous roles across modalities, and thus design flat and symmetric fusion structures. However, this assumption is ill-suited for acoustic signals, which are inherently sparse and contact-driven. To achieve precise robotic manipulation through acoustic-informed perception, we propose a hierarchical representation fusion framework that progressively integrates audio, vision, and proprioception. Our approach first conditions visual and proprioceptive representations on acoustic cues, and then explicitly models higher-order cross-modal interactions to capture complementary dependencies among modalities. The fused representation is leveraged by a diffusion-based policy to directly generate continuous robot actions from multimodal observations. The combination of end-to-end learning and hierarchical fusion structure enables the policy to exploit task-relevant acoustic information while mitigating interference from less informative modalities. The proposed method has been evaluated on real-world robotic manipulation tasks, including liquid pouring and cabinet opening. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multimodal fusion frameworks, particularly in scenarios where acoustic cues provide task-relevant information not readily available from visual observations alone. Furthermore, a mutual information analysis is conducted to interpret the effect of audio cues in robotic manipulation via multimodal fusion.
tldr: This paper introduces a hierarchical audio-visual-proprioceptive fusion framework for robotic manipulation, leveraging acoustic cues to enhance perception and improve performance in tasks where visual information is limited.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个用于机器人操作的分层音频-视觉-本体感觉融合框架，利用声音线索来增强感知，并在视觉信息有限的任务中提高性能。
summary_zh: 现有的机器人操作方法主要依赖视觉和本体感觉观测，这在部分可观察的真实世界环境中难以推断与接触相关的交互状态。相比之下，声音线索在接触过程中自然地编码了丰富的交互动态，但在当前的多模态融合文献中仍未得到充分利用。大多数多模态融合方法隐式地假设各模态具有同质性作用，因此设计了扁平且对称的融合结构。然而，这种假设并不适用于本质上稀疏且由接触驱动的声音信号。为了实现通过声音信息感知的精确机器人操作，我们提出了一种分层表示融合框架，逐步整合音频、视觉和本体感觉信息。我们的方法首先将视觉和本体感觉表示以声音线索为条件，然后显式地建模高阶跨模态交互，以捕捉模态间的互补依赖关系。融合后的表示被基于扩散模型的策略所利用，以直接从多模态观测中生成连续的机器人动作。端到端学习和分层融合结构的结合使得策略能够利用与任务相关的声音信息，同时减少来自信息量较少的模态的干扰。该方法已在真实世界的机器人操作任务中进行了评估，包括液体倾倒和橱柜打开。大量实验结果表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的多模态融合框架，尤其是在声音提示提供了仅凭视觉观测难以获得的与任务相关信息的场景中。此外，我们还进行了互信息分析，以解释音频提示通过多模态融合在机器人操作中的作用。

title: ONRAP: Occupancy-driven Noise-Resilient Autonomous Path Planning
summary: Dynamic path planning must remain reliable in the presence of sensing noise, uncertain localization, and incomplete semantic perception. We propose a practical, implementation-friendly planner that operates on occupancy grids and optionally incorporates occupancy-flow predictions to generate ego-centric, kinematically feasible paths that safely navigate through static and dynamic obstacles. The core is a nonlinear program in the spatial domain built on a modified bicycle model with explicit feasibility and collision-avoidance penalties. The formulation naturally handles unknown obstacle classes and heterogeneous agent motion by operating purely in occupancy space. The pipeline runs in real-time (faster than 10 Hz on average), requires minimal tuning, and interfaces cleanly with standard control stacks. We validate our approach in simulation with severe localization and perception noises, and on an F1TENTH platform, demonstrating smooth and safe maneuvering through narrow passages and rough routes. The approach provides a robust foundation for noise-resilient, prediction-aware planning, eliminating the need for handcrafted heuristics. The project website can be accessed at https://honda-research-institute.github.io/onrap/
tldr: The paper introduces ONRAP, a noise-resilient autonomous path planning algorithm based on occupancy grids, validated in simulation and on a physical robot, demonstrating robust maneuvering through noisy and challenging environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为ONRAP的抗噪声自主路径规划算法，该算法基于占据栅格，并在仿真和实际机器人上进行了验证，展示了在嘈杂和具有挑战性的环境中鲁棒的机动能力。
summary_zh: 动态路径规划在存在感知噪声、不确定定位和不完整语义感知的情况下必须保持可靠。我们提出了一种实用且易于实现的规划器，该规划器在占据栅格上运行，并可选择性地结合占据流预测，以生成自中心、运动学可行的路径，从而安全地通过静态和动态障碍物。其核心是一个在空间域中构建的非线性程序，该程序基于改进的自行车模型，并具有显式的可行性和避碰惩罚。通过纯粹在占据空间中操作，该公式能够自然地处理未知的障碍物类别和异构的智能体运动。该方案流程能够实时运行（平均速度快于 10 Hz），所需调整最少，并且能够与标准控制堆栈干净地对接。我们在具有严重定位和感知噪声的仿真以及 F1TENTH 平台上验证了我们的方法，展示了在狭窄通道和崎岖路线上的平稳安全机动。该方法为噪声弹性的、预测感知的规划提供了一个稳健的基础，从而消除了对手工设计的启发式算法的需求。该项目网站可以在 https://honda-research-institute.github.io/onrap/ 访问。

title: Learning on the Fly: Replay-Based Continual Object Perception for Indoor Drones
summary: Autonomous agents such as indoor drones must learn new object classes in real-time while limiting catastrophic forgetting, motivating Class-Incremental Learning (CIL). However, most unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) datasets focus on outdoor scenes and offer limited temporally coherent indoor videos. We introduce an indoor dataset of $14,400$ frames capturing inter-drone and ground vehicle footage, annotated via a semi-automatic workflow with a $98.6\%$ first-pass labeling agreement before final manual verification. Using this dataset, we benchmark 3 replay-based CIL strategies: Experience Replay (ER), Maximally Interfered Retrieval (MIR), and Forgetting-Aware Replay (FAR), using YOLOv11-nano as a resource-efficient detector for deployment-constrained UAV platforms. Under tight memory budgets ($5-10\%$ replay), FAR performs better than the rest, achieving an average accuracy (ACC, $mAP_{50-95}$ across increments) of $82.96\%$ with $5\%$ replay. Gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) analysis shows attention shifts across classes in mixed scenes, which is associated with reduced localization quality for drones. The experiments further demonstrate that replay-based continual learning can be effectively applied to edge aerial systems. Overall, this work contributes an indoor UAV video dataset with preserved temporal coherence and an evaluation of replay-based CIL under limited replay budgets. Project page: https://spacetime-vision-robotics-laboratory.github.io/learning-on-the-fly-cl
tldr: The paper introduces a new indoor UAV video dataset and benchmarks replay-based continual learning strategies (ER, MIR, FAR) for object perception on resource-constrained drones, demonstrating the effectiveness of FAR under tight memory budgets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个新的室内无人机视频数据集，并对基于回放的持续学习策略（ER、MIR、FAR）在资源受限的无人机上进行目标感知进行了基准测试，证明了FAR在有限内存预算下的有效性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
诸如室内无人机之类的自主智能体必须实时学习新的物体类别，同时限制灾难性遗忘，这推动了类别增量学习(CIL)的研究。然而，大多数无人机数据集都侧重于室外场景，并且提供的具有时间一致性的室内视频有限。我们引入了一个包含14400帧的室内数据集，该数据集捕捉了无人机之间以及地面车辆的拍摄画面，并通过半自动工作流程进行标注，在最终手动验证前，其首轮标注一致性达到了98.6%。利用该数据集，我们对三种基于重放的CIL策略进行了基准测试：经验重放(ER)、最大干扰检索(MIR)和遗忘感知重放(FAR)，使用YOLOv11-nano作为资源高效的检测器，适用于部署受限的无人机平台。在严格的内存预算（5-10%重放）下，FAR表现优于其他方法，在5%重放的情况下，平均精度（ACC，增量的$mAP_{50-95}$）达到82.96%。梯度加权类激活图(Grad-CAM)分析表明，在混合场景中，注意力在类别之间转移，这与无人机定位质量的下降有关。实验进一步证明，基于重放的持续学习可以有效地应用于边缘空中系统。总而言之，这项工作贡献了一个具有保留时间一致性的室内无人机视频数据集，并评估了在有限重放预算下的基于重放的CIL。项目主页：https://spacetime-vision-robotics-laboratory.github.io/learning-on-the-fly-cl

title: High-Fidelity, Customizable Force Sensing for the Wearable Human-Robot Interface
summary: Mechanically characterizing the human-machine interface is essential to understanding user behavior and optimizing wearable robot performance. This interface has been challenging to sensorize due to manufacturing complexity and non-linear sensor responses. Here, we measure human limb-device interaction via fluidic innervation, creating a 3D-printed silicone pad with embedded air channels to measure forces. As forces are applied to the pad, the air channels compress, resulting in a pressure change measurable by off-the-shelf pressure transducers. We demonstrate in benchtop testing that pad pressure is highly linearly related to applied force ($R^2 = 0.998$). This is confirmed with clinical dynamometer correlations with isometric knee torque, where above-knee pressure was highly correlated with flexion torque ($R^2 = 0.95$), while below-knee pressure was highly correlated with extension torque ($R^2 = 0.75$). We build on these idealized settings to test pad performance in more unconstrained settings. We place the pad over \textit{biceps brachii} during cyclic curls and stepwise isometric holds, observing a correlation between pressure and elbow angle. Finally, we integrated the sensor into the strap of a lower-extremity robotic exoskeleton and recorded pad pressure during repeated squats with the device unpowered. Pad pressure tracked squat phase and overall task dynamics consistently. Overall, our preliminary results suggest fluidic innervation is a readily customizable sensing modality with high signal-to-noise ratio and temporal resolution for capturing human-machine mechanical interaction. In the long-term, this modality may provide an alternative real-time sensing input to control / optimize wearable robotic systems and to capture user function during device use.
tldr: The paper presents a novel fluidic innervation-based force sensing system for wearable human-robot interfaces, demonstrating high linearity and correlation with human biomechanics during various exercises and suggesting its potential for real-time control and user function monitoring.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新型的基于流体神经支配的力感应系统，用于可穿戴人机界面。该系统在各种运动中表现出高线性度和与人体生物力学的相关性，并暗示了其在实时控制和用户功能监控方面的潜力。
summary_zh: 对人机交互界面进行机械特性表征对于理解用户行为和优化可穿戴机器人性能至关重要。由于制造复杂性和非线性传感器响应，该界面的传感器化一直具有挑战性。在此，我们通过流体神经支配测量人体肢体-设备交互作用，创建了一种具有嵌入式气道的3D打印硅胶垫来测量力。当力施加到垫上时，气道压缩，导致压力变化，这可以通过现成的压力传感器测量。我们在台架测试中证明，垫的压力与施加的力高度线性相关（$R^2 = 0.998$）。这在临床测力计与等长膝关节扭矩的相关性中得到证实，其中膝关节上方压力与屈曲扭矩高度相关（$R^2 = 0.95$），而膝关节下方压力与伸展扭矩高度相关（$R^2 = 0.75$）。我们在这些理想化设置的基础上，在更不受约束的设置中测试垫的性能。我们将垫放置在肱二头肌上，进行循环弯举和逐步等长保持，观察到压力与肘关节角度之间的相关性。最后，我们将传感器集成到下肢机器人外骨骼的绑带中，并在设备未通电的情况下记录重复深蹲期间的垫压力。垫压力可以一致地跟踪深蹲阶段和整体任务动态。总而言之，我们的初步结果表明，流体神经支配是一种易于定制的传感方式，具有高信噪比和时间分辨率，可用于捕获人机机械交互作用。从长远来看，这种方式可能为控制/优化可穿戴机器人系统和在设备使用期间捕获用户功能提供一种替代的实时传感输入。

title: A Data-Driven Algorithm for Model-Free Control Synthesis
summary: Presented is an algorithm to synthesize the optimal infinite-horizon LQR feedback controller for continuous-time systems. The algorithm does not require knowledge of the system dynamics but instead uses only a finite-length sampling of arbitrary input-output data. The algorithm is based on a constrained optimization problem that enforces a necessary condition on the dynamics of the optimal value function along any trajectory. In addition to calculating the standard LQR gain matrix, a feedforward gain can be found to implement a reference tracking controller. This paper presents a theoretical justification for the method and shows several examples, including a validation test on a real scale aircraft.
tldr: This paper presents a data-driven, model-free algorithm for synthesizing optimal LQR controllers and feedforward gains for reference tracking, validating it on a real aircraft.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的无模型算法，用于合成最优LQR控制器和前馈增益以实现参考跟踪，并在真实飞机上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于合成连续时间系统最优无限时域LQR反馈控制器的算法。该算法不需要了解系统动力学，而仅使用任意输入输出数据的有限长度采样。该算法基于一个约束优化问题，该问题沿任意轨迹强制执行最优价值函数动力学的一个必要条件。除了计算标准的LQR增益矩阵外，还可以找到一个前馈增益来实现参考跟踪控制器。本文给出了该方法的理论依据，并展示了几个例子，包括一个在真实比例飞机上的验证测试。

title: AuTAgent: A Reinforcement Learning Framework for Tool-Augmented Audio Reasoning
summary: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) excel at perception but struggle with complex reasoning requiring precise acoustic measurements. While external tools can extract fine-grained features like exact tempo or pitch, effective integration remains challenging: naively using all tools causes information overload, while prompt-based selection fails to assess context-dependent utility. To address this, we propose AuTAgent (Audio Tool Agent), a reinforcement learning framework that learns when and which tools to invoke. By employing a sparse-feedback training strategy with a novel Differential Reward mechanism, the agent learns to filter out irrelevant tools and invokes external assistance only when it yields a net performance gain over the base model. Experimental results confirm that AuTAgent complements the representation bottleneck of LALMs by providing verifiable acoustic evidence. It improves accuracy by 4.20% / 6.20% and 9.80% / 8.00% for open-source and closed-source backbones on the MMAU Test-mini and the MMAR benchmarks, respectively. In addition, further experiments demonstrate exceptional transferability. We highlight the complementary role of external tools in augmenting audio model reasoning.
