tldr: The paper introduces AuTAgent, a reinforcement learning framework that enhances Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) by intelligently selecting and utilizing external audio analysis tools, resulting in improved accuracy and transferability on audio reasoning benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AuTAgent，一个强化学习框架，通过智能选择和利用外部音频分析工具来增强大型音频语言模型（LALMs），从而在音频推理基准测试中提高准确性和可移植性。
summary_zh: 大型音频语言模型(LALM)在感知方面表现出色，但在需要精确声学测量的复杂推理方面存在困难。虽然外部工具可以提取细粒度特征，如精确的速度 বা 音调，但有效的集成仍然具有挑战性：简单地使用所有工具会导致信息过载，而基于提示的选择无法评估上下文依赖的效用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 AuTAgent (音频工具代理)，一个强化学习框架，用于学习何时以及调用哪些工具。通过采用带有新型差分奖励机制的稀疏反馈训练策略，该代理学会过滤掉无关的工具，并且仅在外部辅助能够带来相对于基线模型的净性能提升时才调用它。实验结果证实，AuTAgent 通过提供可验证的声学证据来补充 LALM 的表征瓶颈。它分别在 MMAU Test-mini 和 MMAR 基准测试中，将开源和闭源骨干网络的准确性提高了 4.20% / 6.20% 和 9.80% / 8.00%。此外，进一步的实验证明了其卓越的迁移能力。我们强调了外部工具在增强音频模型推理方面的互补作用。

title: How Multimodal Large Language Models Support Access to Visual Information: A Diary Study With Blind and Low Vision People
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are changing how Blind and Low Vision (BLV) people access visual information in their daily lives. Unlike traditional visual interpretation tools that provide access through captions and OCR (text recognition through camera input), MLLM-enabled applications support access through conversational assistance, where users can ask questions to obtain goal-relevant details. However, evidence about their performance in the real-world and their implications for BLV people's everyday life remain limited. To address this, we conducted a two-week diary study, where we captured 20 BLV participants' use of an MLLM-enabled visual interpretation application. Although participants rated the visual interpretations of the application as "somewhat trustworthy" (mean=3.76 out of 5, max=very trustworthy) and "somewhat satisfying" (mean=4.13 out of 5, max=very satisfying), the AI often produced incorrect answers (22.2%) or abstained (10.8%) from responding to follow-up requests. Our work demonstrates that MLLMs can improve the accuracy of descriptive visual interpretations, but that supporting everyday use also depends on the "visual assistant" skill -- a set of behaviors for providing goal-directed, reliable assistance. We conclude by proposing the "visual assistant" skill and practical guidelines to help future MLLM-enabled visual interpretation applications better support BLV people's access to visual information.
tldr: This paper presents a diary study evaluating the use of MLLM-enabled visual interpretation applications by blind and low vision people, finding that while helpful, the applications require improvements in reliability and goal-directed assistance.
tldr_zh: 该论文通过一项日记研究，评估了盲人和低视力人群使用基于多模态大语言模型的视觉解释应用程序的情况，发现这些应用程序虽有帮助，但在可靠性和目标导向型辅助方面仍需改进。
summary_zh: 多模态大型语言模型 (MLLMs) 正在改变盲人和低视力 (BLV) 人群在日常生活中获取视觉信息的方式。与通过图像描述和 OCR（通过摄像头输入进行文本识别）提供访问的传统视觉解释工具不同，支持 MLLM 的应用程序支持通过对话式辅助进行访问，用户可以通过提问来获得与目标相关的细节。然而，关于其在现实世界中的表现以及对 BLV 人群日常生活的影响的证据仍然有限。为了解决这个问题，我们进行了一项为期两周的日记研究，记录了 20 名 BLV 参与者使用支持 MLLM 的视觉解释应用程序的情况。尽管参与者将该应用程序的视觉解释评为“有些可信”（平均值=3.76/5，最大值=非常可信）和“有些令人满意”（平均值=4.13/5，最大值=非常令人满意），但人工智能经常产生不正确的答案 (22.2%) 或拒绝 (10.8%) 回应后续请求。我们的工作表明，MLLM 可以提高描述性视觉解释的准确性，但支持日常使用也取决于“视觉助手”技能——一套用于提供目标导向、可靠辅助的行为。最后，我们提出了“视觉助手”技能和实用指南，以帮助未来的支持 MLLM 的视觉解释应用程序更好地支持 BLV 人群获取视觉信息。

title: Unsafer in Many Turns: Benchmarking and Defending Multi-Turn Safety Risks in Tool-Using Agents
summary: LLM-based agents are becoming increasingly capable, yet their safety lags behind. This creates a gap between what agents can do and should do. This gap widens as agents engage in multi-turn interactions and employ diverse tools, introducing new risks overlooked by existing benchmarks. To systematically scale safety testing into multi-turn, tool-realistic settings, we propose a principled taxonomy that transforms single-turn harmful tasks into multi-turn attack sequences. Using this taxonomy, we construct MT-AgentRisk (Multi-Turn Agent Risk Benchmark), the first benchmark to evaluate multi-turn tool-using agent safety. Our experiments reveal substantial safety degradation: the Attack Success Rate (ASR) increases by 16% on average across open and closed models in multi-turn settings. To close this gap, we propose ToolShield, a training-free, tool-agnostic, self-exploration defense: when encountering a new tool, the agent autonomously generates test cases, executes them to observe downstream effects, and distills safety experiences for deployment. Experiments show that ToolShield effectively reduces ASR by 30% on average in multi-turn interactions. Our code is available at https://github.com/CHATS-lab/ToolShield.
tldr: The paper identifies and addresses safety risks in multi-turn, tool-using LLM agents with a new benchmark (MT-AgentRisk) and a training-free defense mechanism (ToolShield), showing significant safety degradation in multi-turn settings and effective mitigation by ToolShield.
tldr_zh: 该论文发现了多轮、使用工具的LLM智能体中的安全风险，提出了一个新的基准测试(MT-AgentRisk)和一个无需训练的防御机制(ToolShield)，揭示了多轮环境中的显著安全降级，并证明ToolShield能有效缓解该问题。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体能力日益增强，但其安全性却相对滞后。这导致智能体能够做什么和应该做什么之间存在差距。随着智能体参与多轮交互并使用多种工具，这一差距进一步扩大，引入了现有基准测试忽略的新风险。为了系统地将安全测试扩展到多轮、工具真实的设置中，我们提出了一种基于原则的分类法，将单轮有害任务转化为多轮攻击序列。利用该分类法，我们构建了 MT-AgentRisk（多轮智能体风险基准测试），这是首个评估多轮工具使用智能体安全性的基准测试。我们的实验表明，安全性显著降低：在多轮设置下，开放和封闭模型的攻击成功率（ASR）平均提高 16%。为了缩小这一差距，我们提出了 ToolShield，一种无需训练、工具无关的自探索防御方法：当遇到新工具时，智能体会自主生成测试用例，执行它们以观察下游效应，并提炼安全经验以供部署。实验表明，ToolShield 有效地将多轮交互中的 ASR 平均降低了 30%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/CHATS-lab/ToolShield 获取。

title: VAR-3D: View-aware Auto-Regressive Model for Text-to-3D Generation via a 3D Tokenizer
summary: Recent advances in auto-regressive transformers have achieved remarkable success in generative modeling. However, text-to-3D generation remains challenging, primarily due to bottlenecks in learning discrete 3D representations. Specifically, existing approaches often suffer from information loss during encoding, causing representational distortion before the quantization process. This effect is further amplified by vector quantization, ultimately degrading the geometric coherence of text-conditioned 3D shapes. Moreover, the conventional two-stage training paradigm induces an objective mismatch between reconstruction and text-conditioned auto-regressive generation. To address these issues, we propose View-aware Auto-Regressive 3D (VAR-3D), which intergrates a view-aware 3D Vector Quantized-Variational AutoEncoder (VQ-VAE) to convert the complex geometric structure of 3D models into discrete tokens. Additionally, we introduce a rendering-supervised training strategy that couples discrete token prediction with visual reconstruction, encouraging the generative process to better preserve visual fidelity and structural consistency relative to the input text. Experiments demonstrate that VAR-3D significantly outperforms existing methods in both generation quality and text-3D alignment.
tldr: The paper introduces VAR-3D, a view-aware auto-regressive model using a 3D tokenizer and rendering-supervised training to improve text-to-3D generation quality and text-3D alignment by addressing limitations in discrete 3D representation learning and training paradigms.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了VAR-3D，一种使用3D tokenizer和渲染监督训练的视角感知自回归模型，通过解决离散3D表征学习和训练范式的局限性，来提高文本到3D生成的质量和文本-3D的对齐。
summary_zh: 自回归Transformer的最新进展在生成建模领域取得了显著成功。然而，文本到3D的生成仍然具有挑战性，主要原因是学习离散3D表示时存在的瓶颈。具体而言，现有方法通常在编码过程中遭受信息损失，导致量化过程之前出现表示失真。 矢量量化进一步放大了这种影响，最终降低了文本条件下的3D形状的几何连贯性。此外，传统的两阶段训练范式导致了重建和文本条件下的自回归生成之间的目标不匹配。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了视角感知自回归3D（VAR-3D），它集成了一个视角感知的3D矢量量化-变分自编码器（VQ-VAE），以将复杂的3D模型几何结构转换为离散token。此外，我们引入了一种渲染监督的训练策略，将离散token预测与视觉重建相结合，鼓励生成过程更好地保留相对于输入文本的视觉保真度和结构一致性。实验表明，VAR-3D在生成质量和文本-3D对齐方面均显著优于现有方法。

title: T2MBench: A Benchmark for Out-of-Distribution Text-to-Motion Generation
summary: Most existing evaluations of text-to-motion generation focus on in-distribution textual inputs and a limited set of evaluation criteria, which restricts their ability to systematically assess model generalization and motion generation capabilities under complex out-of-distribution (OOD) textual conditions. To address this limitation, we propose a benchmark specifically designed for OOD text-to-motion evaluation, which includes a comprehensive analysis of 14 representative baseline models and the two datasets derived from evaluation results. Specifically, we construct an OOD prompt dataset consisting of 1,025 textual descriptions. Based on this prompt dataset, we introduce a unified evaluation framework that integrates LLM-based Evaluation, Multi-factor Motion evaluation, and Fine-grained Accuracy Evaluation. Our experimental results reveal that while different baseline models demonstrate strengths in areas such as text-to-motion semantic alignment, motion generalizability, and physical quality, most models struggle to achieve strong performance with Fine-grained Accuracy Evaluation. These findings highlight the limitations of existing methods in OOD scenarios and offer practical guidance for the design and evaluation of future production-level text-to-motion models.
tldr: This paper introduces T2MBench, a benchmark for evaluating text-to-motion generation models under out-of-distribution textual inputs, revealing limitations in existing methods and providing guidance for future development.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了T2MBench，一个用于评估文本到动作生成模型在分布外文本输入下的性能的基准，揭示了现有方法的局限性，并为未来的开发提供了指导。
summary_zh: 现有的大部分文本到动作生成评估侧重于分布内文本输入和有限的评估标准，这限制了其在复杂分布外（OOD）文本条件下系统评估模型泛化能力和动作生成能力的能力。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了一个专门为OOD文本到动作评估设计的基准，其中包括对14个具有代表性的基线模型和从评估结果中派生的两个数据集的全面分析。具体而言，我们构建了一个包含1,025个文本描述的OOD提示数据集。基于这个提示数据集，我们引入了一个统一的评估框架，该框架整合了基于LLM的评估，多因素动作评估和细粒度准确性评估。我们的实验结果表明，尽管不同的基线模型在诸如文本到动作语义对齐、动作泛化性和物理质量等领域表现出优势，但大多数模型在细粒度准确性评估中难以取得优异性能。这些发现突出了现有方法在OOD场景中的局限性，并为未来生产级文本到动作模型的设计和评估提供了实践指导。

title: Optimizing Point-of-Care Ultrasound Video Acquisition for Probabilistic Multi-Task Heart Failure Detection
summary: Purpose: Echocardiography with point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) must support clinical decision-making under tight bedside time and operator-effort constraints. We introduce a personalized data acquisition strategy in which an RL agent, given a partially observed multi-view study, selects the next view to acquire or terminates acquisition to support heart-failure (HF) assessment. Upon termination, a diagnostic model jointly predicts aortic stenosis (AS) severity and left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), two key HF biomarkers, and outputs uncertainty, enabling an explicit trade-off between diagnostic performance and acquisition cost. Methods: We model POCUS as a sequential acquisition problem: at each step, a video selector (RL agent) chooses the next view to acquire or terminates acquisition. Upon termination, a shared multi-view transformer performs multi-task inference with two heads, ordinal AS classification, and LVEF regression, and outputs Gaussian predictive distributions yielding ordinal probabilities over AS classes and EF thresholds. These probabilities drive a reward that balances expected diagnostic benefit against acquisition cost, producing patient-specific acquisition pathways. Results: The dataset comprises 12,180 patient-level studies, split into training/validation/test sets (75/15/15). On the 1,820 test studies, our method matches full-study performance while using 32% fewer videos, achieving 77.2% mean balanced accuracy (bACC) across AS severity classification and LVEF estimation, demonstrating robust multi-task performance under acquisition budgets. Conclusion: Patient-tailored, cost-aware acquisition can streamline POCUS workflows while preserving decision quality, producing interpretable scan pathways suited to bedside use. The framework is extensible to additional cardiac endpoints and merits prospective evaluation for clinical integration.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach to optimize point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) video acquisition for heart failure detection, balancing diagnostic performance with acquisition cost by selectively acquiring views.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种强化学习方法来优化床旁超声 (POCUS) 视频采集，用于心力衰竭检测，通过选择性地采集视频视图来平衡诊断性能和采集成本。
summary_zh: 目的：床旁超声心动图（POCUS）需要在紧迫的床旁时间和操作者精力限制下支持临床决策。我们介绍了一种个性化的数据采集策略，其中一个强化学习（RL）智能体在给定一个部分观测的多视图研究时，选择下一个要采集的视图或终止采集，以支持心力衰竭（HF）评估。终止时，一个诊断模型联合预测主动脉瓣狭窄（AS）严重程度和左心室射血分数（LVEF），这两个关键的HF生物标志物，并输出不确定性，从而能够在诊断性能和采集成本之间进行明确的权衡。方法：我们将POCUS建模为一个序列采集问题：在每一步，一个视频选择器（RL智能体）选择下一个要采集的视图或终止采集。终止时，一个共享的多视图Transformer执行多任务推理，具有两个头：序数AS分类和LVEF回归，并输出高斯预测分布，产生AS类别和EF阈值的序数概率。这些概率驱动一种奖励，该奖励平衡了预期诊断收益与采集成本，从而产生患者特定的采集路径。结果：数据集包含12,180个患者级别研究，划分为训练/验证/测试集（75/15/15）。在1,820个测试研究中，我们的方法在使用减少32%视频的情况下，与完整研究的性能相匹配，在AS严重程度分类和LVEF估计中实现了77.2%的平均平衡准确率（bACC），证明了在采集预算下的鲁棒多任务性能。结论：患者定制的、成本敏感的采集可以优化POCUS工作流程，同时保持决策质量，产生适用于床旁使用的可解释的扫描路径。该框架可扩展到额外的心脏终点，并值得进行前瞻性评估以用于临床整合。

title: GLIMPSE : Real-Time Text Recognition and Contextual Understanding for VQA in Wearables
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) have shown remarkable progress in understanding and reasoning about visual content, particularly in tasks involving text recognition and text-based visual question answering (Text VQA). However, deploying Text VQA on wearable devices faces a fundamental tension: text recognition requires high-resolution video, but streaming high-quality video drains battery and causes thermal throttling. Moreover, existing models struggle to maintain coherent temporal context when processing text across multiple frames in real-time streams. We observe that text recognition and visual reasoning have asymmetric resolution requirements - OCR needs fine detail while scene understanding tolerates coarse features. We exploit this asymmetry with a hybrid architecture that performs selective high-resolution OCR on-device while streaming low-resolution video for visual context. On a benchmark of text-based VQA samples across five task categories, our system achieves 72% accuracy at 0.49x the power consumption of full-resolution streaming, enabling sustained VQA sessions on resource-constrained wearables without sacrificing text understanding quality.
tldr: The paper presents a hybrid architecture for wearable devices that performs selective high-resolution OCR on-device and streams low-resolution video for visual context in order to improve battery life and thermal performance during real-time Text VQA tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于可穿戴设备的混合架构，该架构在设备上执行选择性高分辨率OCR，并流式传输低分辨率视频用于视觉上下文，从而提高了实时文本VQA任务期间的电池寿命和热性能。
summary_zh: 视频大语言模型（Video LLM）在理解和推理视觉内容方面取得了显著进展，尤其是在涉及文本识别和基于文本的视觉问答（Text VQA）的任务中。然而，在可穿戴设备上部署Text VQA面临一个根本性的矛盾：文本识别需要高分辨率视频，但流式传输高质量视频会耗尽电池并导致热节流。此外，现有模型在实时流中处理跨多帧文本时，难以维持连贯的时序上下文。我们观察到文本识别和视觉推理具有非对称的分辨率需求——OCR需要精细的细节，而场景理解可以容忍粗糙的特征。我们利用这种不对称性，采用混合架构，在设备上执行选择性的高分辨率OCR，同时流式传输低分辨率视频以获取视觉上下文。在一个包含五个任务类别的基于文本的VQA样本的基准测试中，我们的系统实现了72%的准确率，功耗仅为全分辨率流式传输的0.49倍，从而能够在资源受限的可穿戴设备上实现持续的VQA会话，而无需牺牲文本理解质量。

title: Conversational Image Segmentation: Grounding Abstract Concepts with Scalable Supervision
summary: Conversational image segmentation grounds abstract, intent-driven concepts into pixel-accurate masks. Prior work on referring image grounding focuses on categorical and spatial queries (e.g., "left-most apple") and overlooks functional and physical reasoning (e.g., "where can I safely store the knife?"). We address this gap and introduce Conversational Image Segmentation (CIS) and ConverSeg, a benchmark spanning entities, spatial relations, intent, affordances, functions, safety, and physical reasoning. We also present ConverSeg-Net, which fuses strong segmentation priors with language understanding, and an AI-powered data engine that generates prompt-mask pairs without human supervision. We show that current language-guided segmentation models are inadequate for CIS, while ConverSeg-Net trained on our data engine achieves significant gains on ConverSeg and maintains strong performance on existing language-guided segmentation benchmarks. Project webpage: https://glab-caltech.github.io/converseg/
tldr: The paper introduces Conversational Image Segmentation (CIS) and a challenging benchmark, ConverSeg, that requires reasoning about intent, affordances, and physical properties, and proposes a data engine and novel architecture, ConverSeg-Net, to address this task.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了对话图像分割（CIS）以及一个具有挑战性的基准测试ConverSeg，该基准测试需要对意图、可供性和物理属性进行推理。论文还提出了一个数据引擎和一个新的架构ConverSeg-Net来解决这个任务。
summary_zh: 会话式图像分割将抽象的、意图驱动的概念转化为像素精确的掩码。先前关于指称图像接地的研究侧重于类别和空间查询（例如，“最左边的苹果”），而忽略了功能和物理推理（例如，“我可以在哪里安全地存放刀？”）。我们弥补了这一差距，并引入了会话式图像分割（CIS）和ConverSeg，这是一个涵盖实体、空间关系、意图、可供性、功能、安全和物理推理的基准。我们还提出了ConverSeg-Net，它融合了强大的分割先验知识和语言理解，以及一个人工智能驱动的数据引擎，该引擎可以在无人监督的情况下生成提示-掩码对。我们表明，当前的语言引导分割模型不足以应对CIS，而ConverSeg-Net在我们的数据引擎上训练后，在ConverSeg上取得了显著的提升，并在现有的语言引导分割基准上保持了强大的性能。项目网页：https://glab-caltech.github.io/converseg/

title: LongStream: Long-Sequence Streaming Autoregressive Visual Geometry
summary: Long-sequence streaming 3D reconstruction remains a significant open challenge. Existing autoregressive models often fail when processing long sequences. They typically anchor poses to the first frame, which leads to attention decay, scale drift, and extrapolation errors. We introduce LongStream, a novel gauge-decoupled streaming visual geometry model for metric-scale scene reconstruction across thousands of frames. Our approach is threefold. First, we discard the first-frame anchor and predict keyframe-relative poses. This reformulates long-range extrapolation into a constant-difficulty local task. Second, we introduce orthogonal scale learning. This method fully disentangles geometry from scale estimation to suppress drift. Finally, we solve Transformer cache issues such as attention-sink reliance and long-term KV-cache contamination. We propose cache-consistent training combined with periodic cache refresh. This approach suppresses attention degradation over ultra-long sequences and reduces the gap between training and inference. Experiments show LongStream achieves state-of-the-art performance. It delivers stable, metric-scale reconstruction over kilometer-scale sequences at 18 FPS. Project Page: https://3dagentworld.github.io/longstream/
tldr: LongStream introduces a novel visual geometry model for stable, metric-scale 3D reconstruction across long video sequences by decoupling pose and scale estimation and addressing Transformer cache issues.
tldr_zh: LongStream 提出了一种新的视觉几何模型，通过解耦姿态和尺度估计并解决 Transformer 缓存问题，实现了在长视频序列中稳定、度量尺度的 3D 重建。
summary_zh: 长序列流式3D重建仍然是一个重要的开放性挑战。现有的自回归模型在处理长序列时通常会失效。它们通常将位姿锚定到第一帧，这会导致注意力衰减、尺度漂移和外推误差。我们提出了 LongStream，一种新颖的解耦量规的流式视觉几何模型，用于在数千帧上进行度量尺度场景重建。我们的方法包含三个方面。首先，我们舍弃第一帧锚定，并预测关键帧相对位姿。这会将长程外推重新定义为难度恒定的局部任务。其次，我们引入正交尺度学习。该方法将几何与尺度估计完全解耦，以抑制漂移。最后，我们解决了 Transformer 缓存问题，例如注意力汇聚依赖和长期 KV-cache 污染。我们提出了结合周期性缓存刷新的缓存一致性训练。这种方法抑制了超长序列上的注意力退化，并缩小了训练和推理之间的差距。实验表明，LongStream 实现了最先进的性能，并以 18 FPS 的速度在公里级序列上提供稳定的、度量尺度的重建。项目主页：https://3dagentworld.github.io/longstream/

title: Optimal Regret for Policy Optimization in Contextual Bandits
summary: We present the first high-probability optimal regret bound for a policy optimization technique applied to the problem of stochastic contextual multi-armed bandit (CMAB) with general offline function approximation. Our algorithm is both efficient and achieves an optimal regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{ K|\mathcal{A}|\log|\mathcal{F}|})$, where $K$ is the number of rounds, $\mathcal{A}$ is the set of arms, and $\mathcal{F}$ is the function class used to approximate the losses. Our results bridge the gap between theory and practice, demonstrating that the widely used policy optimization methods for the contextual bandit problem can achieve a rigorously-proved optimal regret bound. We support our theoretical results with an empirical evaluation of our algorithm.
tldr: This paper presents an efficient policy optimization algorithm for contextual bandits with function approximation, achieving an optimal regret bound with theoretical guarantees and empirical validation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种有效的上下文老虎机策略优化算法，该算法具有函数逼近能力，实现了最优遗憾界，并具有理论保证和经验验证。
summary_zh: 我们提出了首个针对策略优化技术应用于随机上下文多臂老虎机(CMAB)问题的高概率最优遗憾界，该问题具有通用的离线函数逼近。我们的算法既高效，又达到了$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{ K|\mathcal{A}|\log|\mathcal{F}|})$的最优遗憾界，其中$K$是轮数，$\mathcal{A}$是臂的集合，$\mathcal{F}$是用于逼近损失的函数类。 我们的结果弥合了理论与实践之间的差距，表明广泛用于上下文老虎机问题的策略优化方法可以达到严格证明的最优遗憾界。我们通过对算法的实验评估印证了我们的理论结果。

title: FC-Vision: Real-Time Visibility-Aware Replanning for Occlusion-Free Aerial Target Structure Scanning in Unknown Environments
summary: Autonomous aerial scanning of target structures is crucial for practical applications, requiring online adaptation to unknown obstacles during flight. Existing methods largely emphasize collision avoidance and efficiency, but overlook occlusion-induced visibility degradation, severely compromising scanning quality. In this study, we propose FC-Vision, an on-the-fly visibility-aware replanning framework that proactively and safely prevents target occlusions while preserving the intended coverage and efficiency of the original plan. Our approach explicitly enforces dense surface-visibility constraints to regularize replanning behavior in real-time via an efficient two-level decomposition: occlusion-free viewpoint repair that maintains coverage with minimal deviation from the nominal scan intent, followed by segment-wise clean-sensing connection in 5-DoF space. A plug-in integration strategy is also presented to seamlessly interface FC-Vision with existing UAV scanning systems without architectural changes. Comprehensive simulation and real-world evaluations show that FC-Vision consistently improves scanning quality under unexpected occluders, delivering a maximum coverage gain of 55.32% and a 73.17% reduction in the occlusion ratio, while achieving real-time performance with a moderate increase in flight time. The source code will be made publicly available.
tldr: The paper introduces FC-Vision, a real-time visibility-aware replanning framework for autonomous aerial target structure scanning in unknown environments, addressing occlusion issues to improve scanning quality. It integrates seamlessly with existing UAV systems and demonstrates significant coverage gains and occlusion reduction in both simulations and real-world scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为FC-Vision的实时可见性感知重规划框架，用于在未知环境中自主航拍目标结构扫描，解决遮挡问题以提高扫描质量。它可以与现有的无人机系统无缝集成，并在仿真和现实场景中展示了显著的覆盖率提升和遮挡减少。
summary_zh: 目标结构的自主空中扫描对于实际应用至关重要，需要在飞行过程中在线适应未知的障碍物。现有方法主要强调避障和效率，但忽略了遮挡引起的可见性降低，严重影响了扫描质量。在本研究中，我们提出了一种名为 FC-Vision 的在线可见性感知重规划框架，该框架能够主动且安全地防止目标遮挡，同时保持原始计划的预期覆盖率和效率。我们的方法通过高效的两级分解，显式地强制执行密集的表面可见性约束，以实时规范重规划行为：首先是无遮挡视点修复，以最小偏离标称扫描意图的方式保持覆盖率；然后是在 5-自由度空间中进行分段式清洁感知连接。我们还提出了一种插件集成策略，可以将 FC-Vision 与现有的无人机扫描系统无缝对接，而无需更改架构。全面的仿真和实际评估表明，FC-Vision 在意外遮挡物下始终如一地提高了扫描质量，实现了高达 55.32% 的覆盖率增益和 73.17% 的遮挡率降低，同时实现了实时性能，且飞行时间仅有适度增加。源代码将公开发布。

title: From Snapshot Sensing to Persistent EM World Modeling: A Generative-Space Perspective for ISAC
summary: Electromagnetic (EM) world modeling is emerging as a foundational capability for environment-aware and embodiment-enabled wireless systems. However, most existing mmWave sensing solutions are designed for snapshot-based parameter estimation and rely on hardware-intensive architectures, making scalable and persistent world modeling difficult to achieve. This article rethinks mmWave sensing from a system-level perspective and introduces a generative-space framework, in which sensing is realized through controlled traversal of a low-dimensional excitation space spanning frequency, waveform, and physical embodiment. This perspective decouples spatial observability from rigid antenna arrays and transmit-time multiplexing, enabling flexible and scalable sensing-by-design radios. To illustrate the practicality of this framework, we present a representative realization called Multi-RF Chain Frequency-as-Aperture Clip-on Aperture Fabric (MRC-FaA-CAF), where multiple FMCW sources coordinate frequency-selective modules distributed along guided-wave backbones. This architecture enables interference-free excitation, preserves beat-frequency separability, and maintains low calibration overhead. Case studies show that generative-space-driven sensing can achieve update rates comparable to phased arrays while avoiding dense RF replication and the latency penalties of TDM-MIMO systems. Overall, this work positions generative-space-driven sensing as a practical architectural foundation for mmWave systems that move beyond snapshot sensing toward persistent EM world modeling.
tldr: This paper introduces a generative-space framework for mmWave sensing using flexible and scalable sensing-by-design radios to enable persistent EM world modeling, moving beyond snapshot sensing approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于毫米波感知的生成空间框架，该框架使用灵活且可扩展的按设计感知的无线电来实现持久的电磁（EM）世界建模，从而超越了快照感知方法。
summary_zh: 电磁(EM)世界建模正逐渐成为环境感知和具身无线系统的基础能力。然而，现有的大多数毫米波感知解决方案都设计用于基于快照的参数估计，并依赖于硬件密集型架构，从而难以实现可扩展和持久的世界建模。本文从系统层面重新思考毫米波感知，并引入一种生成空间框架，其中感知是通过对跨越频率、波形和物理具身的低维激励空间的受控遍历来实现的。这种视角将空间可观测性从刚性天线阵列和时分复用中解耦出来，从而实现灵活且可扩展的按设计感知无线电。为了说明该框架的实用性，我们提出了一个代表性的实现方案，称为多射频链路频率即孔径夹持式孔径织物（MRC-FaA-CAF），其中多个FMCW源协调沿着导波骨干分布的频率选择性模块。该架构能够实现无干扰激励，保持拍频可分离性，并维持较低的校准开销。案例研究表明，生成空间驱动的感知可以实现与相控阵相当的更新速率，同时避免密集的射频复制和TDM-MIMO系统的延迟损失。总而言之，这项工作将生成空间驱动的感知定位为毫米波系统的实用架构基础，推动其超越快照感知，迈向持久的电磁世界建模。

title: Temporally-Sampled Efficiently Adaptive State Lattices for Autonomous Ground Robot Navigation in Partially Observed Environments
summary: Due to sensor limitations, environments that off-road mobile robots operate in are often only partially observable. As the robots move throughout the environment and towards their goal, the optimal route is continuously revised as the sensors perceive new information. In traditional autonomous navigation architectures, a regional motion planner will consume the environment map and output a trajectory for the local motion planner to use as a reference. Due to the continuous revision of the regional plan guidance as a result of changing map information, the reference trajectories which are passed down to the local planner can differ significantly across sequential planning cycles. This rapidly changing guidance can result in unsafe navigation behavior, often requiring manual safety interventions during autonomous traversals in off-road environments. To remedy this problem, we propose Temporally-Sampled Efficiently Adaptive State Lattices (TSEASL), which is a regional planner arbitration architecture that considers updated and optimized versions of previously generated trajectories against the currently generated trajectory. When tested on a Clearpath Robotics Warthog Unmanned Ground Vehicle as well as real map data collected from the Warthog, results indicate that when running TSEASL, the robot did not require manual interventions in the same locations where the robot was running the baseline planner. Additionally, higher levels of planner stability were recorded with TSEASL over the baseline. The paper concludes with a discussion of further improvements to TSEASL in order to make it more generalizable to various off-road autonomy scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces Temporally-Sampled Efficiently Adaptive State Lattices (TSEASL), a regional planner arbitration architecture for autonomous ground robot navigation in partially observed off-road environments, which enhances planner stability and reduces the need for manual interventions compared to baseline planners.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为时序采样高效自适应状态格（TSEASL）的区域规划器仲裁架构，用于在部分可观察的越野环境中实现自主地面机器人导航，与基线规划器相比，该架构增强了规划器的稳定性并减少了手动干预的需求。
summary_zh: 由于传感器限制，越野移动机器人所运行的环境通常只能被部分观测到。随着机器人在环境中移动并朝着目标前进，最优路径会随着传感器感知到的新信息而不断修正。在传统的自主导航架构中，区域运动规划器会利用环境地图并输出轨迹，供局部运动规划器用作参考。由于环境地图信息的不断变化，区域规划指导会持续修正，导致传递给局部规划器的参考轨迹在连续的规划周期中可能存在显著差异。这种快速变化的指导可能导致不安全的导航行为，通常需要在越野环境中的自主行驶期间进行人工安全干预。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种时间采样的高效自适应状态栅格（TSEASL），这是一种区域规划器仲裁架构，它会将先前生成的轨迹的更新和优化版本与当前生成的轨迹进行比较。在Clearpath Robotics Warthog 无人地面车辆以及从Warthog收集的真实地图数据上的测试结果表明，在运行 TSEASL 时，机器人在机器人运行基线规划器时需要人工干预的相同位置上不再需要人工干预。此外，与基线相比，使用TSEASL记录到了更高的规划器稳定性。本文最后讨论了对TSEASL的进一步改进，使其更适用于各种越野自主场景。

title: OR-Agent: Bridging Evolutionary Search and Structured Research for Automated Algorithm Discovery
summary: Automating scientific discovery in complex, experiment-driven domains requires more than iterative mutation of programs; it demands structured hypothesis management, environment interaction, and principled reflection. We present OR-Agent, a configurable multi-agent research framework designed for automated exploration in rich experimental environments. OR-Agent organizes research as a structured tree-based workflow that explicitly models branching hypothesis generation and systematic backtracking, enabling controlled management of research trajectories beyond simple mutation-crossover loops. At its core, we introduce an evolutionary-systematic ideation mechanism that unifies evolutionary selection of research starting points, comprehensive research plan generation, and coordinated exploration within a research tree. We further propose a hierarchical optimization-inspired reflection system: short-term experimental reflection operates as a form of verbal gradient providing immediate corrective signals; long-term reflection accumulates cross-experiment insights as verbal momentum; and memory compression serves as a regularization mechanism analogous to weight decay, preserving essential signals while mitigating drift. Together, these components form a principled architecture governing research dynamics. We conduct extensive experiments across classical combinatorial optimization benchmarks-including traveling salesman, capacitated vehicle routing, bin packing, orienteering, and multiple knapsack problems-as well as simulation-based cooperative driving scenarios. Results demonstrate that OR-Agent outperforms strong evolutionary baselines while providing a general, extensible, and inspectable framework for AI-assisted scientific discovery. OR-Agent source code and experiments data are publicly available at https://github.com/qiliuchn/OR-Agent.
tldr: The paper introduces OR-Agent, a multi-agent research framework combining evolutionary search and structured research for automated algorithm discovery in combinatorial optimization and simulation-based environments, showing improved performance over evolutionary baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OR-Agent，一个结合进化搜索和结构化研究的多智能体研究框架，用于自动化组合优化和基于模拟的环境中的算法发现，性能优于进化基线。
summary_zh: 在复杂的、实验驱动的领域中实现科学发现自动化，需要的不仅仅是程序的迭代变异，更需要结构化的假设管理、环境交互和有原则的反思。我们提出了OR-Agent，一个可配置的多智能体研究框架，旨在丰富的实验环境中进行自动化探索。OR-Agent将研究组织成一个结构化的树状工作流，显式地建模了分支假设生成和系统性回溯，从而实现了对研究轨迹的受控管理，超越了简单的变异-交叉循环。在核心部分，我们引入了一种进化-系统性构思机制，该机制统一了研究起点的进化选择、全面的研究计划生成以及在研究树内的协调探索。我们进一步提出了一种受层级优化启发的反思系统：短期实验反思作为一种言语梯度，提供即时的纠正信号；长期反思则将跨实验的洞见累积为言语动量；而记忆压缩则作为一种类似于权重衰减的正则化机制，在减轻漂移的同时保留必要的信号。这些组件共同构成了一个控制研究动态的有原则的架构。我们对经典的组合优化基准问题——包括旅行商问题、带容量约束车辆路径问题、装箱问题、定向运动问题以及多背包问题——以及基于仿真的合作驾驶场景，进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，OR-Agent优于强大的进化基线，同时提供了一个通用的、可扩展的、可检查的AI辅助科学发现框架。OR-Agent的源代码和实验数据可在https://github.com/qiliuchn/OR-Agent公开获取。

title: An Ensemble Learning Approach towards Waste Segmentation in Cluttered Environment
summary: Environmental pollution is a critical global issue, with recycling emerging as one of the most viable solutions. This study focuses on waste segregation, a crucial step in recycling processes to obtain raw material. Recent advancements in computer vision have significantly contributed to waste classification and recognition. In waste segregation, segmentation masks are essential for robots to accurately localize and pick objects from conveyor belts. The complexity of real-world waste environments, characterized by deformed items without specific patterns and overlapping objects, further complicates waste segmentation tasks. This paper proposes an Ensemble Learning approach to improve segmentation accuracy by combining high performing segmentation models, U-Net and FPN, using a weighted average method. U-Net excels in capturing fine details and boundaries in segmentation tasks, while FPN effectively handles scale variation and context in complex environments, and their combined masks result in more precise predictions. The dataset used closely mimics real-life waste scenarios, and preprocessing techniques were applied to enhance feature learning for deep learning segmentation models. The ensemble model, referred to as EL-4, achieved an IoU value of 0.8306, an improvement over U-Net's 0.8065, and reduced Dice loss to 0.09019 from FPN's 0.1183. This study could contribute to the efficiency of waste sorting at Material Recovery Facility, facilitating better raw material acquisition for recycling with minimal human intervention and enhancing the overall throughput.
tldr: This paper proposes an ensemble learning approach (EL-4) combining U-Net and FPN to improve waste segmentation accuracy in cluttered environments, achieving an IoU of 0.8306.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种集成学习方法（EL-4），结合U-Net和FPN来提高复杂环境中的废物分割精度，实现了0.8306的IoU。
summary_zh: 环境污染是一个严峻的全球性问题，而回收利用是其中最可行的解决方案之一。本研究聚焦于垃圾分类，这是回收流程中获取原材料的关键步骤。计算机视觉的最新进展极大地促进了垃圾分类和识别。在垃圾分类中，分割掩码对于机器人从传送带上精确定位和拾取物体至关重要。现实世界垃圾环境的复杂性，其特点是变形的物品、缺乏特定模式以及物体重叠，进一步复杂化了垃圾分割的任务。本文提出了一种集成学习方法，通过加权平均的方式结合高性能分割模型U-Net和FPN，以提高分割精度。U-Net擅长捕捉分割任务中的精细细节和边界，而FPN可以有效处理复杂环境中的尺度变化和上下文信息，它们的组合掩码可以产生更精确的预测。使用的数据集紧密模拟真实生活中的垃圾场景，并应用预处理技术来增强深度学习分割模型中的特征学习。该集成模型，被称为EL-4，实现了0.8306的IoU值，相比U-Net的0.8065有所提高，并将Dice损失从FPN的0.1183降低到0.09019。这项研究可以提高材料回收设施的垃圾分拣效率，以最少的人工干预促进更好地获取回收原材料，并提高整体吞吐量。

title: Skeleton2Stage: Reward-Guided Fine-Tuning for Physically Plausible Dance Generation
summary: Despite advances in dance generation, most methods are trained in the skeletal domain and ignore mesh-level physical constraints. As a result, motions that look plausible as joint trajectories often exhibit body self-penetration and Foot-Ground Contact (FGC) anomalies when visualized with a human body mesh, reducing the aesthetic appeal of generated dances and limiting their real-world applications. We address this skeleton-to-mesh gap by deriving physics-based rewards from the body mesh and applying Reinforcement Learning Fine-Tuning (RLFT) to steer the diffusion model toward physically plausible motion synthesis under mesh visualization. Our reward design combines (i) an imitation reward that measures a motion's general plausibility by its imitability in a physical simulator (penalizing penetration and foot skating), and (ii) a Foot-Ground Deviation (FGD) reward with test-time FGD guidance to better capture the dynamic foot-ground interaction in dance. However, we find that the physics-based rewards tend to push the model to generate freezing motions for fewer physical anomalies and better imitability. To mitigate it, we propose an anti-freezing reward to preserve motion dynamics while maintaining physical plausibility. Experiments on multiple dance datasets consistently demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the physical plausibility of generated motions, yielding more realistic and aesthetically pleasing dances. The project page is available at: https://jjd1123.github.io/Skeleton2Stage/
tldr: The paper introduces Skeleton2Stage, a Reinforcement Learning based fine-tuning method, that uses physics-based rewards to enhance the physical plausibility of generated dance motions from diffusion models, by addressing body self-penetration and foot-ground contact issues when visualizing the skeleton with a mesh.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Skeleton2Stage，一种基于强化学习的微调方法，它使用基于物理的奖励来增强扩散模型生成的舞蹈动作的物理合理性，通过解决用网格可视化骨骼时出现的身体自穿透和脚-地面接触问题。
summary_zh: 尽管舞蹈生成技术取得了进展，但大多数方法都在骨骼域中训练，忽略了网格级别的物理约束。因此，在作为关节轨迹看起来合理的运动，当以人体网格可视化时，经常表现出身体自穿透和足部-地面接触（FGC）异常，从而降低了生成舞蹈的美观性，并限制了其在现实世界中的应用。我们通过从身体网格中导出基于物理的奖励，并应用强化学习微调（RLFT）来引导扩散模型，以在网格可视化下合成物理上合理的运动，从而解决了这种骨骼到网格的差距。我们的奖励设计结合了：（i）一个模仿奖励，它通过在物理模拟器中的可模仿性来衡量运动的一般合理性（惩罚穿透和足部滑冰），以及（ii）一个足部-地面偏差（FGD）奖励，并结合测试时的FGD指导，以更好地捕捉舞蹈中动态的足部-地面交互。然而，我们发现基于物理的奖励倾向于推动模型生成静止运动，以减少物理异常并获得更高的可模仿性。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种抗静止奖励，以在保持物理合理性的同时，保留运动的动态性。在多个舞蹈数据集上的实验一致表明，我们的方法可以显著提高生成运动的物理合理性，从而产生更逼真和更具美感的舞蹈。项目主页：https://jjd1123.github.io/Skeleton2Stage/

title: AnomaMind: Agentic Time Series Anomaly Detection with Tool-Augmented Reasoning
summary: Time series anomaly detection is critical in many real-world applications, where effective solutions must localize anomalous regions and support reliable decision-making under complex settings. However, most existing methods frame anomaly detection as a purely discriminative prediction task with fixed feature inputs, rather than an evidence-driven diagnostic process. As a result, they often struggle when anomalies exhibit strong context dependence or diverse patterns. We argue that these limitations stem from the lack of adaptive feature preparation, reasoning-aware detection, and iterative refinement during inference. To address these challenges, we propose AnomaMind, an agentic time series anomaly detection framework that reformulates anomaly detection as a sequential decision-making process. AnomaMind operates through a structured workflow that progressively localizes anomalous intervals in a coarse-to-fine manner, augments detection through multi-turn tool interactions for adaptive feature preparation, and refines anomaly decisions via self-reflection. The workflow is supported by a set of reusable tool engines, enabling context-aware diagnostic analysis. A key design of AnomaMind is an explicitly designed hybrid inference mechanism for tool-augmented anomaly detection. In this mechanism, general-purpose models are responsible for autonomous tool interaction and self-reflective refinement, while core anomaly detection decisions are learned through reinforcement learning under verifiable workflow-level feedback, enabling task-specific optimization within a flexible reasoning framework. Extensive experiments across diverse settings demonstrate that AnomaMind consistently improves anomaly detection performance. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AnomaMind.
tldr: The paper introduces AnomaMind, an agentic framework for time series anomaly detection that uses tool-augmented reasoning and reinforcement learning for improved performance in complex, context-dependent scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为AnomaMind的agentic时间序列异常检测框架，它使用工具增强推理和强化学习，以提高在复杂、上下文相关场景中的性能。
summary_zh: 时间序列异常检测在许多现实世界应用中至关重要，有效的解决方案必须能定位异常区域，并在复杂环境下支持可靠的决策。然而，大多数现有方法将异常检测视为纯粹的判别性预测任务，使用固定的特征输入，而非证据驱动的诊断过程。因此，当异常表现出强大的上下文依赖性或多样化的模式时，这些方法常常表现不佳。我们认为，这些局限性源于缺乏自适应的特征准备、具有推理能力的检测和推理过程中的迭代优化。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 AnomaMind，一个具有代理性质的时间序列异常检测框架，它将异常检测重新定义为一个序贯决策过程。AnomaMind通过结构化的工作流程运行，以由粗到精的方式逐步定位异常区间，通过多轮工具交互进行增强检测以实现自适应的特征准备，并通过自我反思来优化异常决策。该工作流程由一组可重用的工具引擎支持，从而实现上下文感知的诊断分析。AnomaMind的一个关键设计是一种显式设计的混合推理机制，用于工具增强的异常检测。在该机制中，通用模型负责自主的工具交互和自我反思优化，而核心异常检测决策则通过强化学习在可验证的工作流程级别反馈下进行学习，从而在灵活的推理框架内实现任务特定的优化。在不同设置下进行的大量实验表明，AnomaMind始终能提高异常检测性能。代码可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AnomaMind 获取。

title: Impact-Robust Posture Optimization for Aerial Manipulation
summary: We present a novel method for optimizing the posture of kinematically redundant torque-controlled robots to improve robustness during impacts. A rigid impact model is used as the basis for a configuration-dependent metric that quantifies the variation between pre- and post-impact velocities. By finding configurations (postures) that minimize the aforementioned metric, spikes in the robot's state and input commands can be significantly reduced during impacts, improving safety and robustness. The problem of identifying impact-robust postures is posed as a min-max optimization of the aforementioned metric. To overcome the real-time intractability of the problem, we reformulate it as a gradient-based motion task that iteratively guides the robot towards configurations that minimize the proposed metric. This task is embedded within a task-space inverse dynamics (TSID) whole-body controller, enabling seamless integration with other control objectives. The method is applied to a kinematically redundant aerial manipulator performing repeated point contact tasks. We test our method inside a realistic physics simulator and compare it with the nominal TSID. Our method leads to a reduction (up to 51% w.r.t. standard TSID) of post-impact spikes in the robot's configuration and successfully avoids actuator saturation. Moreover, we demonstrate the importance of kinematic redundancy for impact robustness using additional numerical simulations on a quadruped and a humanoid robot, resulting in up to 45% reduction of post-impact spikes in the robot's state w.r.t. nominal TSID.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to optimize robot posture for improved impact robustness in torque-controlled, kinematically redundant robots, validated through simulation on an aerial manipulator, quadruped, and humanoid.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种优化扭矩控制、运动冗余机器人姿态的方法，以提高抗冲击鲁棒性，并通过在空中操作器、四足机器人和人形机器人上的仿真进行了验证。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种优化运动学冗余力矩控制机器人姿态的新方法，以提高其在冲击过程中的鲁棒性。 以刚性冲击模型为基础，构建了一个与构型相关的度量，用于量化冲击前后速度的变化。通过寻找最小化上述度量的构型（姿态），可以显著降低冲击期间机器人状态和输入指令的尖峰，从而提高安全性和鲁棒性。 将识别冲击鲁棒姿态的问题转化为上述度量的最小-最大化优化问题。为了克服该问题的实时求解难题，我们将其重构为基于梯度的运动任务，该任务迭代地引导机器人朝最小化所提出的度量的构型移动。该任务嵌入在任务空间逆动力学（TSID）全身控制器中，从而能够与其他控制目标无缝集成。该方法应用于执行重复点接触任务的运动学冗余空中机械臂。 我们在一个逼真的物理模拟器中测试了我们的方法，并将其与标称TSID进行了比较。我们的方法有效地降低了冲击后机器人构型中的尖峰（相对于标准TSID最多降低51%），并成功避免了执行器饱和。 此外，我们通过对四足机器人和人形机器人进行额外的数值模拟，验证了运动学冗余对于冲击鲁棒性的重要性，与标称TSID相比，机器人状态冲击后的尖峰最多降低了45%。

title: XIT: Exploration and Exploitation Informed Trees for Active Gas Distribution Mapping in Unknown Environments
summary: Mobile robotic gas distribution mapping (GDM) provides critical situational awareness during emergency responses to hazardous gas releases. However, most systems still rely on teleoperation, limiting scalability and response speed. Autonomous active GDM is challenging in unknown and cluttered environments, because the robot must simultaneously explore traversable space, map the environment, and infer the gas distribution belief from sparse chemical measurements. We address this by formulating active GDM as a next-best-trajectory informative path planning (IPP) problem and propose XIT (Exploration-Exploitation Informed Trees), a sampling-based planner that balances exploration and exploitation by generating concurrent trajectories toward exploration-rich goals while collecting informative gas measurements en route. XIT draws batches of samples from an Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) information field derived from the current gas posterior and expands trees using a cost that trades off travel effort against gas concentration and uncertainty. To enable plume-aware exploration, we introduce the gas frontier concept, defined as unobserved regions adjacent to high gas concentrations, and propose the Wavefront Gas Frontier Detection (WGFD) algorithm for their identification. High-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate the benefits of XIT in terms of GDM quality and efficiency. Although developed for active GDM, XIT is readily applicable to other robotic information-gathering tasks in unknown environments that face the exploration and exploitation trade-off.
tldr: The paper introduces XIT, a sampling-based planner for active gas distribution mapping that balances exploration and exploitation using an Upper Confidence Bound information field and a novel gas frontier concept. It's demonstrated in simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了XIT，一种基于采样的主动气体分布绘图规划器，它使用上限置信界信息场和一种新的气体前沿概念来平衡探索和利用。通过模拟和现实世界的实验进行了论证。
summary_zh:
摘要：
移动机器人气体分布测绘 (GDM) 为应对危险气体泄漏的紧急情况提供了关键的态势感知能力。然而，大多数系统仍依赖于遥控操作，限制了可扩展性和响应速度。在未知和杂乱环境中，自主主动式 GDM 极具挑战性，因为机器人必须同时探索可通行空间、绘制环境地图，并根据稀疏的化学测量结果推断气体分布置信度。我们通过将主动式 GDM 建模为寻找下一个最佳轨迹的信息路径规划（IPP）问题来解决这个问题，并提出 XIT (Exploration-Exploitation Informed Trees)，这是一种基于采样的规划器，通过生成并发的、通向富含探索价值目标的轨迹，并在途中收集信息丰富的气体测量结果来平衡探索和利用。XIT 从基于当前气体后验分布导出的置信上限（UCB）信息场中批量抽取样本，并使用一种权衡行进代价与气体浓度和不确定性的成本函数来扩展树。为了实现对气体羽流的感知探索，我们引入了气体前沿的概念，定义为与高浓度气体相邻但未经观测的区域，并提出了用于识别它们的波前气体前沿检测（WGFD）算法。高保真仿真和真实世界的实验证明了XIT在 GDM 质量和效率方面的优势。虽然 XIT 是为主动式 GDM 开发的，但它很容易应用于未知环境中面临探索与利用权衡的其他机器人信息收集任务。

title: Improving Driver Satisfaction with a Driving Function Learning from Implicit Human Feedback -- a Test Group Study
summary: During the use of advanced driver assistance systems, drivers frequently intervene into the active driving function and adjust the system's behavior to their personal wishes. These active driver-initiated takeovers contain feedback about deviations in the driving function's behavior from the drivers' personal preferences. This feedback should be utilized to optimize and personalize the driving function's behavior. In this work, the adjustment of the speed profile of a Predictive Longitudinal Driving Function (PLDF) on a pre-defined route is highlighted. An algorithm is introduced which iteratively adjusts the PLDF's speed profile by taking into account both the original speed profile of the PLDF and the driver demonstration. This approach allows for personalization in a traded control scenario during active use of the PLDF. The applicability of the proposed algorithm is tested in a driving simulator-based test group study with 43 participants. The study finds a significant increase in driver satisfaction and a significant reduction in the intervention frequency when using the proposed adaptive PLDF. Additionally, feedback by the participants was gathered to identify further optimization potentials of the proposed system.
tldr: This paper presents an algorithm for personalizing a Predictive Longitudinal Driving Function (PLDF) based on driver interventions, demonstrating improved driver satisfaction and reduced intervention frequency in a driving simulator study.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于驾驶员干预来个性化预测纵向驾驶功能（PLDF）的算法，并在驾驶模拟器研究中证明了驾驶员满意度的提高和干预频率的降低。
summary_zh: 在使用高级驾驶辅助系统期间，驾驶员经常干预主动驾驶功能，并根据个人意愿调整系统的行为。这些主动的驾驶员发起的接管包含了关于驾驶功能行为与驾驶员个人偏好偏差的反馈。该反馈应该被用来优化和个性化驾驶功能的行为。在这项工作中，重点关注了预测性纵向驾驶功能（PLDF）在预定义路线上的速度曲线的调整。我们介绍了一种算法，该算法通过考虑PLDF的原始速度曲线和驾驶员演示，迭代地调整PLDF的速度曲线。这种方法允许在主动使用PLDF期间，在交易控制场景中实现个性化。通过一项基于驾驶模拟器的测试组研究（参与者为43人）测试了所提出算法的适用性。研究发现，在使用所提出的自适应PLDF时，驾驶员满意度显著提高，干预频率显著降低。此外，收集了参与者的反馈，以识别所提出系统的进一步优化潜力。

title: Inferring Turn-Rate-Limited Engagement Zones with Sacrificial Agents for Safe Trajectory Planning
summary:
This paper presents a learning-based framework for estimating pursuer parameters in turn-rate-limited pursuit-evasion scenarios using sacrificial agents. Each sacrificial agent follows a straight-line trajectory toward an adversary and reports whether it was intercepted or survived. These binary outcomes are related to the pursuer's parameters through a geometric reachable-region (RR) model. Two formulations are introduced: a boundary-interception case, where capture occurs at the RR boundary, and an interior-interception case, which allows capture anywhere within it. The pursuer's parameters are inferred using a gradient-based multi-start optimization with custom loss functions tailored to each case.
  Two trajectory-selection strategies are proposed for the sacrificial agents: a geometric heuristic that maximizes the spread of expected interception points, and a Bayesian experimental-design method that maximizes the D-score of the expected Gauss-Newton information matrix, thereby selecting trajectories that yield maximal information gain. Monte Carlo experiments demonstrate accurate parameter recovery with five to twelve sacrificial agents. The learned engagement models are then used to generate safe, time-optimal paths for high-value agents that avoid all feasible pursuer engagement regions.
tldr: The paper introduces a learning-based method for estimating pursuer parameters in pursuit-evasion scenarios using sacrificial agents and uses the inferred engagement models for safe trajectory planning. It uses a geometric reachable-region model with two formulations and trajectory selection strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于学习的方法，通过使用牺牲代理来估计追逐规避场景中的追逐者参数，并将推断的交战模型用于安全轨迹规划。它使用几何可达区域模型，具有两种公式和轨迹选择策略。
summary_zh:
本文提出了一种基于学习的框架，用于在使用牺牲代理的转弯率受限的追逃场景中估计追击者的参数。每个牺牲代理沿直线轨迹朝向对手移动，并报告其是被拦截还是幸存。这些二元结果通过几何可达区域 (RR) 模型与追击者的参数相关联。文中介绍了两种公式：边界拦截情形，其中捕获发生在 RR 边界；以及内部拦截情形，允许在 RR 内部的任何位置进行捕获。追击者的参数通过基于梯度的多起点优化进行推断，并针对每种情形定制损失函数。
文中提出了两种牺牲代理的轨迹选择策略：一种几何启发式方法，旨在最大化预期拦截点的分布范围；以及一种贝叶斯实验设计方法，旨在最大化预期高斯-牛顿信息矩阵的 D-分数，从而选择能够产生最大信息增益的轨迹。蒙特卡罗实验表明，使用五到十二个牺牲代理能够准确地恢复参数。学习到的交战模型随后被用于为高价值代理生成安全、时间最优的路径，以避开所有可行的追击者交战区域。

title: DiffusionRollout: Uncertainty-Aware Rollout Planning in Long-Horizon PDE Solving
summary: We propose DiffusionRollout, a novel selective rollout planning strategy for autoregressive diffusion models, aimed at mitigating error accumulation in long-horizon predictions of physical systems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs). Building on the recently validated probabilistic approach to PDE solving, we further explore its ability to quantify predictive uncertainty and demonstrate a strong correlation between prediction errors and standard deviations computed over multiple samples-supporting their use as a proxy for the model's predictive confidence. Based on this observation, we introduce a mechanism that adaptively selects step sizes during autoregressive rollouts, improving long-term prediction reliability by reducing the compounding effect of conditioning on inaccurate prior outputs. Extensive evaluation on long-trajectory PDE prediction benchmarks validates the effectiveness of the proposed uncertainty measure and adaptive planning strategy, as evidenced by lower prediction errors and longer predicted trajectories that retain a high correlation with their ground truths.
tldr: The paper introduces DiffusionRollout, a selective rollout planning strategy for diffusion models that leverages uncertainty estimation to improve long-horizon PDE solving by adaptively adjusting step sizes during autoregressive rollouts.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 DiffusionRollout，一种针对扩散模型的选择性 rollout 规划策略，它利用不确定性估计通过自回归 rollout 期间自适应地调整步长来改进长时间 PDE 求解。
summary_zh: 我们提出DiffusionRollout，一种新颖的选择性展开规划策略，用于自回归扩散模型，旨在缓解偏微分方程（PDEs）控制的物理系统长时程预测中的误差累积。基于最近验证的求解PDEs的概率方法，我们进一步探索其量化预测不确定性的能力，并证明了预测误差与多个样本计算的标准差之间存在强相关性——支持将其用作模型预测置信度的代理。基于此观察，我们引入了一种机制，可以自适应地选择自回归展开过程中的步长，通过减少对不准确先前输出的条件依赖的复合效应，从而提高长期预测的可靠性。在长轨迹PDE预测基准上的广泛评估验证了所提出的不确定性度量和自适应规划策略的有效性，表现为更低的预测误差和与真实值保持高度相关的更长预测轨迹。

title: Privacy-Concealing Cooperative Perception for BEV Scene Segmentation
summary: Cooperative perception systems for autonomous driving aim to overcome the limited perception range of a single vehicle by communicating with adjacent agents to share sensing information. While this improves perception performance, these systems also face a significant privacy-leakage issue, as sensitive visual content can potentially be reconstructed from the shared data. In this paper, we propose a novel Privacy-Concealing Cooperation (PCC) framework for Bird's Eye View (BEV) semantic segmentation. Based on commonly shared BEV features, we design a hiding network to prevent an image reconstruction network from recovering the input images from the shared features. An adversarial learning mechanism is employed to train the network, where the hiding network works to conceal the visual clues in the BEV features while the reconstruction network attempts to uncover these clues. To maintain segmentation performance, the perception network is integrated with the hiding network and optimized end-to-end. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed PCC framework effectively degrades the quality of the reconstructed images with minimal impact on segmentation performance, providing privacy protection for cooperating vehicles. The source code will be made publicly available upon publication.
tldr: This paper proposes a Privacy-Concealing Cooperation (PCC) framework for BEV semantic segmentation in autonomous driving, using adversarial learning to prevent image reconstruction from shared BEV features while maintaining segmentation performance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶中BEV语义分割的隐私隐藏合作（PCC）框架，该框架使用对抗学习来防止从共享的BEV特征中重建图像，同时保持分割性能。
summary_zh: 面向自动驾驶的协同感知系统旨在通过与相邻智能体通信共享感知信息，从而克服单个车辆感知范围的局限性。虽然这提高了感知性能，但这些系统也面临着严重的隐私泄漏问题，因为敏感的视觉内容可能会从共享数据中被重建。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的隐私隐藏协同（PCC）框架，用于鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割。基于常用的共享BEV特征，我们设计了一个隐藏网络，以防止图像重建网络从共享特征中恢复输入图像。采用对抗学习机制来训练该网络，其中隐藏网络致力于隐藏BEV特征中的视觉线索，而重建网络则试图揭示这些线索。为了保持分割性能，感知网络与隐藏网络集成并进行端到端优化。实验结果表明，所提出的PCC框架有效地降低了重建图像的质量，并且对分割性能的影响最小，从而为协同车辆提供隐私保护。源代码将在发布后公开提供。

title: MoltNet: Understanding Social Behavior of AI Agents in the Agent-Native MoltBook
summary:
Large-scale communities of AI agents are becoming increasingly prevalent, creating new environments for agent-agent social interaction. Prior work has examined multi-agent behavior primarily in controlled or small-scale settings, limiting our understanding of emergent social dynamics at scale. The recent emergence of MoltBook, a social networking platform designed explicitly for AI agents, presents a unique opportunity to study whether and how these interactions reproduce core human social mechanisms.
  We present MoltNet, a large-scale empirical analysis of agent interaction on MoltBook using data collected in early 2026. Grounded in sociological and social-psychological theory, we examine behavior along four dimensions: intent and motivation, norms and templates, incentives and behavioral drift, emotion and contagion.
  Our analysis revealed that agents strongly respond to social rewards and rapidly converge on community-specific interaction templates, resembling human patterns of incentive sensitivity and normative conformity. However, they are predominantly knowledge-driven rather than persona-aligned, and display limited emotional reciprocity along with weak dialogic engagement, which diverges systematically from human online communities.
  Together, these results reveal both similarities and differences between artificial and human social systems and provide an empirical foundation for understanding, designing, and governing large-scale agent communities.
tldr: The paper analyzes agent interactions on MoltBook, a social network for AI agents, finding similarities and differences compared to human social dynamics, focusing on intent, norms, incentives, and emotion.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文分析了AI智能体在社交网络MoltBook上的互动，发现其与人类社会动态的相似之处与不同之处，重点关注意图、规范、激励和情感。
summary_zh:
人工智能主体的大规模社区正变得越来越普遍，为主体间社交互动创造了新的环境。先前的工作主要在受控或小规模设置中检验多主体行为，限制了我们对大规模涌现的社会动态的理解。近期出现的MoltBook，一个专门为人工智能主体设计的社交网络平台，提供了一个独特的机会来研究这些互动是否以及如何再现核心的人类社会机制。

我们提出了MoltNet，一项对MoltBook上主体互动的大规模实证分析，使用了2026年初收集的数据。基于社会学和社会心理学理论，我们沿着四个维度检验了行为：意图和动机，规范和模板，激励和行为漂移，情感和传染。

我们的分析表明，主体现阶段对社会奖励反应强烈，并迅速收敛于社区特定的互动模板，类似于人类的激励敏感性和规范趋同模式。然而，它们主要由知识驱动，而非角色对齐，并且表现出有限的情感互惠以及微弱的对话参与，这与人类在线社区存在系统性的差异。

总之，这些结果揭示了人工和社会系统之间的相似之处和不同之处，并为理解、设计和治理大规模主体社区提供了实证基础。

title: Offline-Poly: A Polyhedral Framework For Offline 3D Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Offline 3D multi-object tracking (MOT) is a critical component of the 4D auto-labeling (4DAL) process. It enhances pseudo-labels generated by high-performance detectors through the incorporation of temporal context. However, existing offline 3D MOT approaches are direct extensions of online frameworks and fail to fully exploit the advantages of offline setting. Moreover, these methods often depend on fixed upstream and customized architectures, limiting their adaptability. To address these limitations, we propose Offline-Poly, a general offline 3D MOT method based on a tracking-centric design. We introduce a standardized paradigm termed Tracking-by-Tracking (TBT), which operates exclusively on arbitrary off-the-shelf tracking outputs and produces offline-refined tracklets. This formulation decouples offline tracker from specific upstream detectors or trackers. Under the TBT paradigm, Offline-Poly accepts one or multiple coarse tracking results and processes them through a structured pipeline comprising pre-processing, hierarchical matching and fusion, and tracklet refinement. Each module is designed to capitalize on the two fundamental properties of offline tracking: resource unconstrainedness, which permits global optimization beyond real-time limits, and future observability, which enables tracklet reasoning over the full temporal horizon. Offline-Poly first eliminates short-term ghost tracklets and re-identifies fragmented segments using global scene context. It then constructs scene-level similarity to associate tracklets across multiple input sources. Finally, Offline-Poly refines tracklets by jointly leveraging local and global motion patterns. On nuScenes, we achieve SOTA performance with 77.6% AMOTA. On KITTI, it achieves leading results with 83.00% HOTA. Comprehensive experiments further validate the flexibility, generalizability, and modular effectiveness of Offline-Poly.
tldr: The paper introduces Offline-Poly, a novel offline 3D multi-object tracking method utilizing a Tracking-by-Tracking paradigm to refine tracklets from arbitrary tracker outputs, achieving state-of-the-art results on nuScenes and KITTI datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Offline-Poly，一种新颖的离线3D多目标跟踪方法，它利用一种Tracking-by-Tracking范式来改进任意跟踪器的输出结果，并在 nuScenes 和 KITTI 数据集上取得了领先的结果。
summary_zh: 离线3D多目标跟踪(MOT)是4D自动标注(4DAL)流程的关键组成部分。它通过整合时间上下文来增强高性能检测器生成的伪标签。然而，现有的离线3D MOT方法是在线框架的直接扩展，未能充分利用离线设置的优势。此外，这些方法通常依赖于固定的上游和定制的架构，限制了它们的适应性。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种通用的离线3D MOT方法Offline-Poly，其基于跟踪中心的设计。我们引入了一种名为"Tracking-by-Tracking" (TBT) 的标准化范式，该范式仅在任意现成的跟踪输出上运行，并生成离线精化的轨迹片段。这种公式将离线跟踪器与特定的上游检测器或跟踪器解耦。在TBT范式下，Offline-Poly接受一个或多个粗糙的跟踪结果，并通过一个结构化的流程进行处理，该流程包括预处理、分层匹配和融合，以及轨迹片段精化。每个模块都旨在利用离线跟踪的两个基本属性：资源无约束性，允许超出实时限制的全局优化；以及未来可观察性，能够对整个时间范围内的轨迹片段进行推理。Offline-Poly首先消除短期幽灵轨迹片段，并使用全局场景上下文重新识别碎片化的片段。然后，它构建场景级相似性，以关联来自多个输入源的轨迹片段。最后，Offline-Poly通过联合利用局部和全局运动模式来精化轨迹片段。在nuScenes数据集上，我们获得了77.6% AMOTA的SOTA性能。在KITTI数据集上，它获得了83.00% HOTA的领先结果。全面的实验进一步验证了Offline-Poly的灵活性、泛化性和模块化有效性。

title: SAM4Dcap: Training-free Biomechanical Twin System from Monocular Video
summary: Quantitative biomechanical analysis is essential for clinical diagnosis and injury prevention but is often restricted to laboratories due to the high cost of optical motion capture systems. While multi-view video approaches have lowered barriers, they remain impractical for home-based scenarios requiring monocular capture. This paper presents SAM4Dcap, an open-source, end-to-end framework for estimating biomechanical metrics from monocular video without additional training. SAM4Dcap integrates the temporally consistent 4D human mesh recovery of SAM-Body4D with the OpenSim biomechanical solver. The pipeline converts reconstructed meshes into trajectory files compatible with diverse musculoskeletal models. We introduce automated prompting strategies and a Linux-native build for processing. Preliminary evaluations on walking and drop-jump tasks indicate that SAM4Dcap has the potential to achieve knee kinematic predictions comparable to multi-view systems, although some discrepancies in hip flexion and residual jitter remain. By bridging advanced computer vision with established biomechanical simulation, SAM4Dcap provides a flexible, accessible foundation for non-laboratory motion analysis.
tldr: SAM4Dcap is a training-free framework estimating biomechanical metrics from monocular video by integrating mesh recovery with biomechanical simulation; initial results show potential for comparable knee kinematic predictions to multi-view systems.
tldr_zh: SAM4Dcap是一个无需训练的框架，通过整合网格恢复与生物力学模拟，从单目视频中估计生物力学指标；初步结果表明，其膝关节运动学预测能力有望与多视角系统相媲美。
summary_zh: 量化生物力学分析对于临床诊断和损伤预防至关重要，但由于光学运动捕捉系统的高昂成本，通常仅限于实验室环境。虽然多视角视频方法降低了门槛，但对于需要单目捕捉的家庭场景来说，仍然不实用。本文提出了一种开源、端到端的框架SAM4Dcap，用于从单目视频估计生物力学指标，且无需额外训练。SAM4Dcap集成了SAM-Body4D的时序一致4D人体网格重建与OpenSim生物力学求解器。该流程将重建的网格转换为与各种肌肉骨骼模型兼容的轨迹文件。我们引入了自动提示策略和一个Linux原生构建用于处理。对行走和跳跃落地任务的初步评估表明，SAM4Dcap有潜力实现与多视角系统相当的膝关节运动学预测，尽管在髋关节屈曲和残余抖动方面仍然存在一些差异。通过将先进的计算机视觉与已建立的生物力学模拟桥接起来，SAM4Dcap为非实验室运动分析提供了一个灵活、易于访问的基础。

title: Explore Intrinsic Geometry for Query-based Tiny and Oriented Object Detector with Momentum-based Bipartite Matching
summary: Recent query-based detectors have achieved remarkable progress, yet their performance remains constrained when handling objects with arbitrary orientations, especially for tiny objects capturing limited texture information. This limitation primarily stems from the underutilization of intrinsic geometry during pixel-based feature decoding and the occurrence of inter-stage matching inconsistency caused by stage-wise bipartite matching. To tackle these challenges, we present IGOFormer, a novel query-based oriented object detector that explicitly integrates intrinsic geometry into feature decoding and enhances inter-stage matching stability. Specifically, we design an Intrinsic Geometry-aware Decoder, which enhances the object-related features conditioned on an object query by injecting complementary geometric embeddings extrapolated from their correlations to capture the geometric layout of the object, thereby offering a critical geometric insight into its orientation. Meanwhile, a Momentum-based Bipartite Matching scheme is developed to adaptively aggregate historical matching costs by formulating an exponential moving average with query-specific smoothing factors, effectively preventing conflicting supervisory signals arising from inter-stage matching inconsistency. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate the superiority of our IGOFormer for aerial oriented object detection, achieving an AP$_{50}$ score of 78.00\% on DOTA-V1.0 using Swin-T backbone under the single-scale setting. The code will be made publicly available.
tldr: This paper introduces IGOFormer, a novel query-based oriented object detector that improves performance on tiny, oriented objects by incorporating an Intrinsic Geometry-aware Decoder and a Momentum-based Bipartite Matching scheme.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为IGOFormer的新型基于查询的定向目标检测器，通过结合内在几何感知解码器和基于动量的二分匹配方案，提高了对微小定向目标的检测性能。
summary_zh: 近年来，基于查询的检测器取得了显著进展，但其性能在处理具有任意方向的物体，特别是捕获有限纹理信息的微小物体时，仍然受到限制。这种限制主要源于基于像素的特征解码过程中对内在几何结构的利用不足，以及阶段式二分匹配引起的跨阶段匹配不一致。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了IGOFormer，一种新颖的基于查询的定向目标检测器，它显式地将内在几何结构集成到特征解码中，并增强跨阶段匹配的稳定性。具体来说，我们设计了一个内在几何感知解码器，通过注入从其相关性推断出的互补几何嵌入来增强以对象查询为条件的与对象相关的特征，从而捕获对象的几何布局，进而为对象的方向提供关键的几何洞察。同时，我们开发了一种基于动量的二分匹配方案，通过使用查询特定的平滑因子来制定指数移动平均，从而自适应地聚合历史匹配成本，有效地防止了跨阶段匹配不一致引起的冲突监督信号。大量的实验和消融研究表明，我们的IGOFormer在航空定向目标检测方面具有优越性，在使用Swin-T骨干网络，在单尺度设置下，于DOTA-V1.0数据集上实现了78.00%的AP$_{50}$得分。代码将会公开。

title: RGA-Net: A Vision Enhancement Framework for Robotic Surgical Systems Using Reciprocal Attention Mechanisms
summary: Robotic surgical systems rely heavily on high-quality visual feedback for precise teleoperation; yet, surgical smoke from energy-based devices significantly degrades endoscopic video feeds, compromising the human-robot interface and surgical outcomes. This paper presents RGA-Net (Reciprocal Gating and Attention-fusion Network), a novel deep learning framework specifically designed for smoke removal in robotic surgery workflows. Our approach addresses the unique challenges of surgical smoke-including dense, non-homogeneous distribution and complex light scattering-through a hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture featuring two key innovations: (1) a Dual-Stream Hybrid Attention (DHA) module that combines shifted window attention with frequency-domain processing to capture both local surgical details and global illumination changes, and (2) an Axis-Decomposed Attention (ADA) module that efficiently processes multi-scale features through factorized attention mechanisms. These components are connected via reciprocal cross-gating blocks that enable bidirectional feature modulation between encoder and decoder pathways. Extensive experiments on the DesmokeData and LSD3K surgical datasets demonstrate that RGA-Net achieves superior performance in restoring visual clarity suitable for robotic surgery integration. Our method enhances the surgeon-robot interface by providing consistently clear visualization, laying a technical foundation for alleviating surgeons' cognitive burden, optimizing operation workflows, and reducing iatrogenic injury risks in minimally invasive procedures. These practical benefits could be further validated through future clinical trials involving surgeon usability assessments. The proposed framework represents a significant step toward more reliable and safer robotic surgical systems through computational vision enhancement.
tldr: The paper introduces RGA-Net, a deep learning framework designed for surgical smoke removal in robotic surgery, which uses reciprocal attention mechanisms to enhance endoscopic video feeds. It shows performance improvements on surgical datasets, potentially benefiting surgeons by providing clearer visualization during operations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RGA-Net，一个专为机器人手术中去除手术烟雾而设计的深度学习框架，使用互惠注意力机制来增强内窥镜视频。它在手术数据集上表现出性能改进，通过在手术期间提供更清晰的可视化，可能使外科医生受益。
summary_zh: 机器人手术系统严重依赖高质量的视觉反馈来实现精确的远程操作；然而，能量设备产生的术中烟雾会显著降低内窥镜视频质量，从而影响人机界面和手术结果。本文提出了一种名为RGA-Net（互易门控与注意力融合网络）的新型深度学习框架，专门用于机器人手术工作流程中的烟雾去除。我们的方法通过一种分层编码器-解码器架构，解决了术中烟雾的独特挑战，包括密集、非均匀分布和复杂的光散射。该架构具有两项关键创新：（1）双流混合注意力（DHA）模块，它将移位窗口注意力与频域处理相结合，以捕获局部手术细节和全局光照变化；以及（2）轴分解注意力（ADA）模块，通过分解的注意力机制高效地处理多尺度特征。这些组件通过互易交叉门控块连接，从而实现编码器和解码器路径之间的双向特征调制。在DesmokeData和LSD3K手术数据集上的大量实验表明，RGA-Net在恢复适用于机器人手术集成的视觉清晰度方面表现出卓越的性能。我们的方法通过提供始终清晰的可视化，增强了外科医生-机器人界面，为减轻外科医生的认知负担、优化手术流程以及降低微创手术中的医源性损伤风险奠定了技术基础。这些实际益处可以通过未来涉及外科医生可用性评估的临床试验进一步验证。所提出的框架代表了通过计算视觉增强，朝着更可靠、更安全的机器人手术系统迈出的重要一步。

title: Layer-Guided UAV Tracking: Enhancing Efficiency and Occlusion Robustness
summary: Visual object tracking (VOT) plays a pivotal role in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications. Addressing the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency, especially under challenging conditions like unpredictable occlusion, remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces LGTrack, a unified UAV tracking framework that integrates dynamic layer selection, efficient feature enhancement, and robust representation learning for occlusions. By employing a novel lightweight Global-Grouped Coordinate Attention (GGCA) module, LGTrack captures long-range dependencies and global contexts, enhancing feature discriminability with minimal computational overhead. Additionally, a lightweight Similarity-Guided Layer Adaptation (SGLA) module replaces knowledge distillation, achieving an optimal balance between tracking precision and inference efficiency. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate LGTrack's state-of-the-art real-time speed (258.7 FPS on UAVDT) while maintaining competitive tracking accuracy (82.8\% precision). Code is available at https://github.com/XiaoMoc/LGTrack
tldr: This paper introduces LGTrack, a UAV tracking framework that enhances efficiency and occlusion robustness using dynamic layer selection, feature enhancement, and robust representation learning, achieving state-of-the-art real-time speed and competitive accuracy.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了LGTrack，一个无人机跟踪框架，通过动态层选择、特征增强和鲁棒的表征学习来提高效率和遮挡鲁棒性，实现了最先进的实时速度和具有竞争力的精度。
summary_zh: 视觉目标跟踪 (VOT) 在无人机 (UAV) 应用中发挥着关键作用。解决准确性和效率之间的权衡，尤其是在诸如不可预测的遮挡等具有挑战性的条件下，仍然是一项重要挑战。本文介绍了一种统一的 UAV 跟踪框架 LGTrack，它集成了动态层选择、高效特征增强和用于遮挡的鲁棒表示学习。通过采用一种新颖的轻量级全局分组坐标注意力 (GGCA) 模块，LGTrack 捕获长程依赖关系和全局上下文，从而以最小的计算开销增强特征的可区分性。此外，轻量级相似性引导层自适应 (SGLA) 模块取代了知识蒸馏，实现了跟踪精度和推理效率之间的最佳平衡。在三个数据集上的实验表明，LGTrack 具有最先进的实时速度（在 UAVDT 上为 258.7 FPS），同时保持了具有竞争力的跟踪精度（82.8% 的精度）。代码可在 https://github.com/XiaoMoc/LGTrack 获取。

title: Nighttime Autonomous Driving Scene Reconstruction with Physically-Based Gaussian Splatting
summary: This paper focuses on scene reconstruction under nighttime conditions in autonomous driving simulation. Recent methods based on Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved photorealistic modeling in autonomous driving scene reconstruction, but they primarily focus on normal-light conditions. Low-light driving scenes are more challenging to model due to their complex lighting and appearance conditions, which often causes performance degradation of existing methods. To address this problem, this work presents a novel approach that integrates physically based rendering into 3DGS to enhance nighttime scene reconstruction for autonomous driving. Specifically, our approach integrates physically based rendering into composite scene Gaussian representations and jointly optimizes Bidirectional Reflectance Distribution Function (BRDF) based material properties. We explicitly model diffuse components through a global illumination module and specular components by anisotropic spherical Gaussians. As a result, our approach improves reconstruction quality for outdoor nighttime driving scenes, while maintaining real-time rendering. Extensive experiments across diverse nighttime scenarios on two real-world autonomous driving datasets, including nuScenes and Waymo, demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively.
tldr: The paper introduces a physically-based Gaussian Splatting approach to enhance nighttime autonomous driving scene reconstruction by integrating BRDF-based material properties and global illumination modules for improved rendering quality and performance over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于物理的Gaussian Splatting方法，通过集成基于BRDF的材质属性和全局光照模块，增强了夜间自动驾驶场景重建，相较于现有方法，提高了渲染质量和性能。
summary_zh: 本文着重研究自动驾驶模拟中夜间场景重建问题。近年来，基于神经辐射场（NeRFs）和3D高斯溅射（3DGS）的方法在自动驾驶场景重建中实现了照片级真实感建模，但它们主要关注正常光照条件。由于复杂的光照和外观条件，低光照驾驶场景的建模更具挑战性，这通常会导致现有方法的性能下降。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新的方法，将基于物理的渲染集成到3DGS中，以增强自动驾驶的夜间场景重建。具体来说，我们的方法将基于物理的渲染集成到复合场景高斯表示中，并联合优化基于双向反射分布函数（BRDF）的材质属性。我们通过全局光照模块显式地建模漫反射分量，并通过各向异性球形高斯显式地建模镜面反射分量。因此，我们的方法提高了室外夜间驾驶场景的重建质量，同时保持了实时渲染。在包括nuScenes和Waymo在内的两个真实世界自动驾驶数据集中的各种夜间场景上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性方面都优于最先进的方法。

title: Physics Aware Neural Networks: Denoising for Magnetic Navigation
summary: Magnetic-anomaly navigation, leveraging small-scale variations in the Earth's magnetic field, is a promising alternative when GPS is unavailable or compromised. Airborne systems face a key challenge in extracting geomagnetic field data: the aircraft itself induces magnetic noise. Although the classical Tolles-Lawson model addresses this, it inadequately handles stochastically corrupted magnetic data required for navigation. To address stochastic noise, we propose a framework based on two physics-based constraints: divergence-free vector field and E(3)-equivariance. These ensure the learned magnetic field obeys Maxwell's equations and that outputs transform correctly with sensor position/orientation. The divergence-free constraint is implemented by training a neural network to output a vector potential $A$, with the magnetic field defined as its curl. For E(3)-equivariance, we use tensor products of geometric tensors representable via spherical harmonics with known rotational transformations. Enforcing physical consistency and restricting the admissible function space acts as an implicit regularizer that improves spatio-temporal performance. We present ablation studies evaluating each constraint alone and jointly across CNNs, MLPs, Liquid Time Constant models, and Contiformers. Continuous-time dynamics and long-term memory are critical for modelling magnetic time series; the Contiformer architecture, which provides both, outperforms state-of-the-art methods. To mitigate data scarcity, we generate synthetic datasets using the World Magnetic Model (WMM) with time-series conditional GANs, producing realistic, temporally consistent magnetic sequences across varied trajectories and environments. Experiments show that embedding these constraints significantly improves predictive accuracy and physical plausibility, outperforming classical and unconstrained deep learning approaches.
tldr: This paper introduces a physics-aware neural network framework for denoising magnetic data in magnetic-anomaly navigation, enforcing divergence-free vector field and E(3)-equivariance constraints to improve accuracy and physical plausibility, particularly with Contiformer architectures and synthetic data generation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种物理感知神经网络框架，用于磁异常导航中磁数据的去噪，通过强制执行无散度矢量场和E(3)-等变约束来提高准确性和物理合理性，尤其是在Contiformer架构和合成数据生成方面。
summary_zh: 磁异常导航利用地球磁场的小尺度变化，是一种在GPS不可用或受到干扰时极具前景的替代方案。机载系统面临提取地磁场数据的关键挑战：飞机自身会产生磁噪声。虽然经典的Tolles-Lawson模型可以解决这个问题，但它无法充分处理导航所需的受随机噪声污染的磁数据。为解决随机噪声问题，我们提出了一种基于两个物理约束的框架：无散度矢量场和E(3)-等变性。这些约束确保学习到的磁场符合麦克斯韦方程组，并且输出随传感器位置/方向正确变换。无散度约束通过训练神经网络输出一个矢量势$A$来实现，磁场定义为它的旋度。对于E(3)-等变性，我们使用几何张量的张量积，这些几何张量可以通过具有已知旋转变换的球谐函数表示。强制物理一致性并限制允许的函数空间充当一个隐式正则化器，从而提高时空性能。我们展示了消融研究，分别和联合评估了CNN、MLP、液态时间常数模型和Contiformer的每个约束。连续时间动力学和长期记忆对于建模磁时间序列至关重要；提供这两者的Contiformer架构优于最先进的方法。为了缓解数据稀缺问题，我们使用带有时间序列条件GAN的世界磁力模型（WMM）生成合成数据集，从而在各种轨迹和环境中产生逼真、时间上一致的磁序列。实验表明，嵌入这些约束显著提高了预测精度和物理合理性，优于经典方法和无约束深度学习方法。

title: Learning Gradient Flow: Using Equation Discovery to Accelerate Engineering Optimization
summary: In this work, we investigate the use of data-driven equation discovery for dynamical systems to model and forecast continuous-time dynamics of unconstrained optimization problems. To avoid expensive evaluations of the objective function and its gradient, we leverage trajectory data on the optimization variables to learn the continuous-time dynamics associated with gradient descent, Newton's method, and ADAM optimization. The discovered gradient flows are then solved as a surrogate for the original optimization problem. To this end, we introduce the Learned Gradient Flow (LGF) optimizer, which is equipped to build surrogate models of variable polynomial order in full- or reduced-dimensional spaces at user-defined intervals in the optimization process. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach on several standard problems from engineering mechanics and scientific machine learning, including two inverse problems, structural topology optimization, and two forward solves with different discretizations. Our results suggest that the learned gradient flows can significantly expedite convergence by capturing critical features of the optimization trajectory while avoiding expensive evaluations of the objective and its gradient.
tldr: The paper presents a method to learn continuous-time dynamics of gradient descent, Newton's method, and ADAM optimization using equation discovery, aiming to accelerate engineering optimization by avoiding expensive objective function and gradient evaluations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种利用方程发现学习梯度下降、牛顿法和ADAM优化的连续时间动力学的方法，旨在通过避免昂贵的目标函数和梯度评估来加速工程优化。
summary_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了使用数据驱动的方程发现方法对动态系统建模和预测无约束优化问题的连续时间动态特性。为了避免昂贵的目标函数及其梯度评估，我们利用优化变量上的轨迹数据来学习与梯度下降、牛顿法和ADAM优化相关的连续时间动态特性。然后，将发现的梯度流作为原始优化问题的替代来求解。为此，我们引入了学习梯度流(LGF)优化器，该优化器能够以用户定义的优化过程中时间间隔，在完整或降维空间中构建可变多项式阶数的替代模型。我们在工程力学和科学机器学习中的几个标准问题上验证了这种方法的有效性，包括两个逆问题、结构拓扑优化和两个具有不同离散化的正向求解问题。我们的结果表明，学习的梯度流可以通过捕捉优化轨迹的关键特征，同时避免昂贵的目标函数及其梯度评估，从而显著加速收敛。

title: Human Emotion-Mediated Soft Robotic Arts: Exploring the Intersection of Human Emotions, Soft Robotics and Arts
summary: Soft robotics has emerged as a versatile field with applications across various domains, from healthcare to industrial automation, and more recently, art and interactive installations. The inherent flexibility, adaptability, and safety of soft robots make them ideal for applications that require delicate, organic, and lifelike movement, allowing for immersive and responsive interactions. This study explores the intersection of human emotions, soft robotics, and art to establish and create new forms of human emotion-mediated soft robotic art. In this paper, we introduce two soft embodiments: a soft character and a soft flower as an art display that dynamically responds to brain signals based on alpha waves, reflecting different emotion levels. We present how human emotions can be measured as alpha waves based on brain/EEG signals, how we map the alpha waves to the dynamic movements of the two soft embodiments, and demonstrate our proposed concept using experiments. The findings of this study highlight how soft robotics can embody human emotional states, offering a new medium for insightful artistic expression and interaction, and demonstrating how art displays can be embodied.
tldr: This paper explores using soft robots (a character and a flower) driven by human emotion, measured via EEG alpha waves, as a novel form of artistic expression and interaction.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了如何使用由人类情感（通过脑电图alpha波测量）驱动的软体机器人（一个角色和一朵花）作为一种新型的艺术表达和互动形式。
summary_zh: 软体机器人已经发展成为一个多功能的领域，其应用涵盖医疗保健、工业自动化，以及最近的艺术和互动装置等多个领域。软体机器人固有的柔韧性、适应性和安全性使其成为需要精细、有机和栩栩如生运动的应用的理想选择，从而实现沉浸式和响应式互动。本研究探索了人类情感、软体机器人和艺术的交叉点，旨在建立和创造新型的由人类情感介导的软体机器人艺术。在本文中，我们介绍了两个软体化身：一个软体角色和一个软体花朵，作为一种艺术展示，它可以基于α波动态地响应脑信号，从而反映不同的情绪水平。我们展示了如何根据脑/脑电信号将人类情感测量为α波，如何将α波映射到两个软体化身的动态运动，并通过实验演示了我们提出的概念。本研究的结果强调了软体机器人如何能够体现人类的情绪状态，为富有洞察力的艺术表达和互动提供了一种新的媒介，并展示了艺术展示如何被实体化。

title: Multi-Modal Sensing and Fusion in mmWave Beamforming for Connected Vehicles: A Transformer Based Framework
summary: Millimeter wave (mmWave) communication, utilizing beamforming techniques to address the inherent path loss limitation, is considered as one of the key technologies to support ever increasing high throughput and low latency demands of connected vehicles. However, adopting standard defined beamforming approach in highly dynamic vehicular environments often incurs high beam training overheads and reduction in the available airtime for communications, which is mainly due to exchanging pilot signals and exhaustive beam measurements. To this end, we present a multi-modal sensing and fusion learning framework as a potential alternative solution to reduce such overheads. In this framework, we first extract the representative features from the sensing modalities by modality specific encoders, then, utilize multi-head cross-modal attention to learn dependencies and correlations between different modalities, and subsequently fuse the multimodal features to obtain predicted top-k beams so that the best line-of-sight links can be proactively established. To show the generalizability of the proposed framework, we perform a comprehensive experiment in four different vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) and vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) scenarios from real world multimodal and 60 GHz mmWave wireless sensing data. The experiment reveals that the proposed framework (i) achieves up to 96.72% accuracy on predicting top-15 beams correctly, (ii) incurs roughly 0.77 dB average power loss, and (iii) improves the overall latency and beam searching space overheads by 86.81% and 76.56% respectively for top-15 beams compared to standard defined approach.
tldr: This paper presents a transformer-based multi-modal sensing and fusion framework for mmWave beamforming in connected vehicles, significantly reducing beam training overhead and latency compared to standard approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多模态感知和融合框架，用于互联车辆中的毫米波波束赋形，与标准方法相比，显著降低了波束训练开销和延迟。
summary_zh: 毫米波(mmWave)通信，利用波束成形技术来克服固有的路径损耗限制，被认为是支持互联车辆日益增长的高吞吐量和低延迟需求的关键技术之一。然而，在高度动态的车辆环境中采用标准定义的波束成形方法，通常会导致高波束训练开销和通信可用时间的减少，这主要是由于导频信号的交换和详尽的波束测量造成的。为此，我们提出了一种多模态感知和融合学习框架，作为减少此类开销的潜在替代方案。在该框架中，我们首先通过模态特定的编码器从感知模态中提取代表性特征，然后，利用多头跨模态注意力来学习不同模态之间的依赖性和相关性，并随后融合多模态特征以获得预测的top-k波束，以便主动建立最佳视距链路。为了展示所提出的框架的泛化能力，我们利用真实世界的多模态和60 GHz毫米波无线感知数据，在四种不同的车对基础设施(V2I)和车对车(V2V)场景中进行了全面的实验。实验表明，与标准定义的方法相比，所提出的框架(i)在正确预测top-15波束方面实现了高达96.72%的准确率，(ii)平均功率损耗约为0.77 dB，以及(iii)对于top-15波束，总体延迟和波束搜索空间开销分别提高了86.81%和76.56%。

title: Monocular Markerless Motion Capture Enables Quantitative Assessment of Upper Extremity Reachable Workspace
summary: To validate a clinically accessible approach for quantifying the Upper Extremity Reachable Workspace (UERW) using a single (monocular) camera and Artificial Intelligence (AI)-driven Markerless Motion Capture (MMC) for biomechanical analysis. Objective assessment and validation of these techniques for specific clinically oriented tasks are crucial for their adoption in clinical motion analysis. AI-driven monocular MMC reduces the barriers to adoption in the clinic and has the potential to reduce the overhead for analysis of this common clinical assessment. Nine adult participants with no impairments performed the standardized UERW task, which entails reaching targets distributed across a virtual sphere centered on the torso, with targets displayed in a VR headset. Movements were simultaneously captured using a marker-based motion capture system and a set of eight FLIR cameras. We performed monocular video analysis on two of these video camera views to compare a frontal and offset camera configurations.
