The frontal camera orientation demonstrated strong agreement with the marker-based reference, exhibiting a minimal mean bias of $0.61 \pm 0.12$ \% reachspace reached per octanct (mean $\pm$ standard deviation). In contrast, the offset camera view underestimated the percent workspace reached ($-5.66 \pm 0.45$ \% reachspace reached). Conclusion: The findings support the feasibility of a frontal monocular camera configuration for UERW assessment, particularly for anterior workspace evaluation where agreement with marker-based motion capture was highest. The overall performance demonstrates clinical potential for practical, single-camera assessments. This study provides the first validation of monocular MMC system for the assessment of the UERW task. By reducing technical complexity, this approach enables broader implementation of quantitative upper extremity mobility assessment.
tldr: The paper validates a monocular, AI-driven markerless motion capture system for assessing upper extremity reachable workspace, showing good agreement with marker-based systems using a frontal camera configuration. This approach simplifies clinical assessment of upper extremity mobility.
tldr_zh: 本文验证了一种基于单目摄像头和人工智能的无标记运动捕捉系统，用于评估上肢可达工作空间，结果表明，使用正面摄像头配置时，该系统与基于标记的系统具有良好的一致性。这种方法简化了上肢活动能力的临床评估。
summary_zh:
摘要：
验证一种具有临床可及性的方法，该方法利用单目摄像头和人工智能驱动的无标记运动捕捉（MMC）来量化上肢可达工作空间（UERW），用于生物力学分析。对这些技术在特定临床任务中的客观评估和验证对于它们在临床运动分析中的应用至关重要。人工智能驱动的单目MMC降低了临床应用的门槛，并有望减少对常见临床评估进行分析的额外开销。九名无功能障碍的成年参与者执行了标准化的UERW任务，该任务包括在VR头显中显示以躯干为中心的虚拟球体上的目标，并到达这些目标。同时使用基于标记的运动捕捉系统和一组八个FLIR摄像机捕捉运动。我们对两个视频摄像机视图进行了单目视频分析，以比较正面和偏置摄像机配置。正面摄像机方向与基于标记的参考系统表现出高度一致性，在每个八分象限中，可达工作空间的平均偏差最小，为$0.61 \pm 0.12$ %（平均值$\pm$标准差）。相比之下，偏置摄像机视图低估了可达工作空间的百分比（$-5.66 \pm 0.45$ %）。结论：研究结果支持正面单目摄像机配置进行UERW评估的可行性，特别是对于前部工作空间评估，此处与基于标记的运动捕捉的一致性最高。总体性能表明该方法在实际的单摄像机评估中具有临床潜力。本研究首次验证了单目MMC系统对UERW任务的评估。通过降低技术复杂性，该方法能够更广泛地实施定量上肢活动度评估。

title: LAF-YOLOv10 with Partial Convolution Backbone, Attention-Guided Feature Pyramid, Auxiliary P2 Head, and Wise-IoU Loss for Small Object Detection in Drone Aerial Imagery
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles serve as primary sensing platforms for surveillance, traffic monitoring, and disaster response, making aerial object detection a central problem in applied computer vision. Current detectors struggle with UAV-specific challenges: targets spanning only a few pixels, cluttered backgrounds, heavy occlusion, and strict onboard computational budgets. This study introduces LAF-YOLOv10, built on YOLOv10n, integrating four complementary techniques to improve small-object detection in drone imagery. A Partial Convolution C2f (PC-C2f) module restricts spatial convolution to one quarter of backbone channels, reducing redundant computation while preserving discriminative capacity. An Attention-Guided Feature Pyramid Network (AG-FPN) inserts Squeeze-and-Excitation channel gates before multi-scale fusion and replaces nearest-neighbor upsampling with DySample for content-aware interpolation. An auxiliary P2 detection head at 160$\times$160 resolution extends localization to objects below 8$\times$8 pixels, while the P5 head is removed to redistribute parameters. Wise-IoU v3 replaces CIoU for bounding box regression, attenuating gradients from noisy annotations in crowded aerial scenes. The four modules address non-overlapping bottlenecks: PC-C2f compresses backbone computation, AG-FPN refines cross-scale fusion, the P2 head recovers spatial resolution, and Wise-IoU stabilizes regression under label noise. No individual component is novel; the contribution is the joint integration within a single YOLOv10 framework. Across three training runs (seeds 42, 123, 256), LAF-YOLOv10 achieves 35.1$\pm$0.3\% mAP@0.5 on VisDrone-DET2019 with 2.3\,M parameters, exceeding YOLOv10n by 3.3 points. Cross-dataset evaluation on UAVDT yields 35.8$\pm$0.4\% mAP@0.5. Benchmarks on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano confirm 24.3 FPS at FP16, demonstrating viability for embedded UAV deployment.
tldr: The paper introduces LAF-YOLOv10, a drone-specific object detection model built on YOLOv10n, incorporating several existing techniques for improved small-object detection in aerial imagery, achieving superior mAP and FPS on relevant datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LAF-YOLOv10，一种基于YOLOv10n的无人机专用目标检测模型，结合了几种现有技术，以提高航拍图像中小目标检测的性能，并在相关数据集上实现了更高的mAP和FPS。
summary_zh: 无人机作为监视、交通监控和灾难响应的主要传感平台，使得空中目标检测成为应用计算机视觉领域的核心问题。当前的检测器难以应对无人机特有的挑战：目标仅跨越少数像素、杂乱的背景、严重的遮挡以及严格的机载计算预算。本研究引入了 LAF-YOLOv10，它构建于 YOLOv10n 之上，集成了四种互补技术，以改善无人机图像中的小目标检测。局部卷积 C2f (PC-C2f) 模块将空间卷积限制在骨干网络通道的四分之一，减少了冗余计算，同时保留了判别能力。注意力引导的特征金字塔网络 (AG-FPN) 在多尺度融合之前插入 Squeeze-and-Excitation 通道门，并用 DySample 替换最近邻上采样，以实现内容感知的插值。160×160 分辨率的辅助 P2 检测头将定位扩展到低于 8×8 像素的目标，同时移除 P5 头以重新分配参数。Wise-IoU v3 替换 CIoU 进行边界框回归，衰减拥挤的空中场景中来自嘈杂标注的梯度。这四个模块解决了非重叠的瓶颈：PC-C2f 压缩了骨干网络的计算，AG-FPN 细化了跨尺度融合，P2 头恢复了空间分辨率，而 Wise-IoU 稳定了标签噪声下的回归。没有单个的组件是新颖的；贡献在于在单个 YOLOv10 框架内的联合集成。在三个训练运行（种子 42、123、256）中，LAF-YOLOv10 在 VisDrone-DET2019 上以 2.3M 参数实现了 35.1±0.3% 的 mAP@0.5，比 YOLOv10n 高出 3.3 个百分点。在 UAVDT 上的跨数据集评估产生了 35.8±0.4% 的 mAP@0.5。在 NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 上的基准测试确认了 FP16 下的 24.3 FPS，证明了嵌入式无人机部署的可行性。

title: ALMo: Interactive Aim-Limit-Defined, Multi-Objective System for Personalized High-Dose-Rate Brachytherapy Treatment Planning and Visualization for Cervical Cancer
summary: In complex clinical decision-making, clinicians must often track a variety of competing metrics defined by aim (ideal) and limit (strict) thresholds. Sifting through these high-dimensional tradeoffs to infer the optimal patient-specific strategy is cognitively demanding and historically prone to variability. In this paper, we address this challenge within the context of High-Dose-Rate (HDR) brachytherapy for cervical cancer, where planning requires strictly managing radiation hot spots while balancing tumor coverage against organ sparing. We present ALMo (Aim-Limit-defined Multi-Objective system), an interactive decision support system designed to infer and operationalize clinician intent. ALMo employs a novel optimization framework that minimizes manual input through automated parameter setup and enables flexible control over toxicity risks. Crucially, the system allows clinicians to navigate the Pareto surface of dosimetric tradeoffs by directly manipulating intuitive aim and limit values. In a retrospective evaluation of 25 clinical cases, ALMo generated treatment plans that consistently met or exceeded manual planning quality, with 65% of cases demonstrating dosimetric improvements. Furthermore, the system significantly enhanced efficiency, reducing average planning time to approximately 17 minutes, compared to the conventional 30-60 minutes. While validated in brachytherapy, ALMo demonstrates a generalized framework for streamlining interaction in multi-criteria clinical decision-making.
tldr: The paper introduces ALMo, an interactive decision support system for High-Dose-Rate brachytherapy treatment planning for cervical cancer, which improves plan quality and reduces planning time significantly by allowing clinicians to navigate dosimetric tradeoffs through aim and limit values.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为ALMo的交互式决策支持系统，用于宫颈癌高剂量率近距离放射治疗计划。该系统通过允许临床医生通过目标和限制值来导航剂量学权衡，从而显著提高计划质量并减少计划时间。
summary_zh: 在复杂的临床决策中，临床医生经常需要跟踪由目标（理想）和限制（严格）阈值定义的各种相互竞争的指标。筛选这些高维度的权衡，推断出针对患者的最佳策略，在认知上要求很高，并且在历史上易于出现变异性。在本文中，我们针对宫颈癌的近距离高剂量率（HDR）后装治疗背景下，解决了这一挑战。该治疗方案的规划需要严格控制辐射热点，同时权衡肿瘤覆盖范围和器官保护。我们提出了一种交互式决策支持系统ALMo（目标-限制定义的多目标系统），旨在推断和操作临床医生的意图。ALMo采用了一种新颖的优化框架，通过自动参数设置最大程度地减少了手动输入，并实现了对毒性风险的灵活控制。至关重要的是，该系统允许临床医生通过直接操作直观的目标和限制值来浏览剂量学权衡的帕累托曲面。在对25个临床病例的回顾性评估中，ALMo生成的治疗计划始终达到或超过了手动计划的质量，其中65%的病例表现出剂量学的改善。此外，该系统显著提高了效率，将平均计划时间缩短至大约17分钟，而传统方法则需要30-60分钟。虽然ALMo已在近距离放射治疗中得到验证，但它展示了一种通用的框架，可用于简化多标准临床决策的交互。

title: Optimal Take-off under Fuzzy Clearances
summary: This paper presents a hybrid obstacle avoidance architecture that integrates Optimal Control under clearance with a Fuzzy Rule Based System (FRBS) to enable adaptive constraint handling for unmanned aircraft. Motivated by the limitations of classical optimal control under uncertainty and the need for interpretable decision making in safety critical aviation systems, we design a three stage Takagi Sugeno Kang fuzzy layer that modulates constraint radii, urgency levels, and activation decisions based on regulatory separation minima and airworthiness guidelines from FAA and EASA. These fuzzy-derived clearances are then incorporated as soft constraints into an optimal control problem solved using the FALCON toolbox and IPOPT. The framework aims to reduce unnecessary recomputations by selectively activating obstacle avoidance updates while maintaining compliance with aviation procedures. A proof of concept implementation using a simplified aircraft model demonstrates that the approach can generate optimal trajectories with computation times of 2,3 seconds per iteration in a single threaded MATLAB environment, suggesting feasibility for near real time applications. However, our experiments revealed a critical software incompatibility in the latest versions of FALCON and IPOPT, in which the Lagrangian penalty term remained identically zero, preventing proper constraint enforcement. This behavior was consistent across scenarios and indicates a solver toolbox regression rather than a modeling flaw. Future work includes validating this effect by reverting to earlier software versions, optimizing the fuzzy membership functions using evolutionary methods, and extending the system to higher fidelity aircraft models and stochastic obstacle environments.
tldr: This paper proposes a hybrid optimal control and fuzzy logic system for unmanned aircraft take-off, addressing obstacle avoidance under uncertainty and interpretable decision-making. However, they encountered a critical software bug inhibiting constraint enforcement during their implementation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于无人机起飞的混合最优控制和模糊逻辑系统，旨在解决不确定性下的避障和可解释的决策问题。然而，在实现过程中他们遇到了一个严重软件漏洞，阻碍了约束强制执行。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种混合避障架构，该架构集成了基于裕度的最优控制与模糊规则系统 (FRBS)，从而为无人机实现自适应约束处理。鉴于传统最优控制在不确定性下的局限性以及安全攸关型航空系统中对可解释决策的需求，我们设计了一个三层 Takagi Sugeno Kang 模糊层，该模糊层基于 FAA 和 EASA 的监管分离最小值和适航指南来调节约束半径、紧急级别和激活决策。这些模糊导出的裕度随后被作为软约束纳入一个最优控制问题中，并使用 FALCON 工具箱和 IPOPT 求解。该框架旨在通过选择性地激活避障更新来减少不必要的重新计算，同时保持对航空程序的合规性。使用简化飞机模型的概念验证实现表明，该方法可以在单线程 MATLAB 环境中生成每次迭代计算时间为 2.3 秒的最优轨迹，这表明其在近实时应用中的可行性。然而，我们的实验揭示了 FALCON 和 IPOPT 最新版本中一个关键的软件不兼容问题，即拉格朗日惩罚项始终为零，从而阻止了适当的约束执行。这种行为在各种场景中都是一致的，表明是求解器工具箱的回归，而不是建模缺陷。未来的工作包括通过恢复到早期软件版本来验证这种影响，使用进化方法优化模糊隶属函数，以及将该系统扩展到更高保真度的飞机模型和随机障碍物环境。
